name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ted Cruz almost lost when he was up for reelection in 2018. Cruz only held off Beto O'Rourke by 2.5%. He's so hated, we can absolutely beat him in '24. With so many Democratic races on the ballot, to hold the Senate, we must fight to win in Texas.
body:
Defend the Senate in 2024
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc6503ab9-d2e6-4b39-a9c8-41982a974311/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, have you had a chance to pitch in to help with the fight against Ted Cruz? **Cruz is one of the most despicable people to ever serve in the Senate. And he could be beaten.** _Do you remember when his constituents' kids were murdered while in school at Uvalde, he ignored guns and, in a slap in the face to victims and survivors, said we must strengthen "doors"?_ _When Cruz’s constituents were freezing to death because of corrupt Republican deals, he responded by going to a luxury resort in Cancun. _ From the NY Times: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc419579-447c-44ff-b804-e90b876fcd13/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**_Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the TX-Senate Democratic Nominee Fund, to convince a top-tier Dem to challenge Cruz and have a large campaign fund waiting for them when they do?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3179192d-9af6-40fe-b3ac-510b0a4f0a1e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Worst of all, Cruz is a traitor who worked with Trump's coup plotters to overthrow our republic. He voted to reject Biden's victory for no reason but to demagogue, even after the deadly attack on our Capitol Jan. 6th, which he helped instigate with a lie-filled diatribe that morning._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1cc21ece-77f0-48e8-9ac2-a4d18c06f2dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_In 2018, Cruz came the closest of any Republican to losing a Senate race in Texas since the 1990s, only holding off Beto O'Rourke by 2.5%. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The Supreme Court’s rampage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
This is how I’m fighting back | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59512586/394434746/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ11Z_SCO_E_20230302_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTM1NTVjMy0xM2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ab7inkEal3gi1PmIOHkvoaind169JSLgbBZcEABtWKY=&emci=8b3555c3-13b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=8e3555c3-13b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
If you’re wondering how much damage Republican extremists can do through the federal judiciary, just look at three issues bubbling up through the courts right now: **One: This week, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments on what should be an open-and-shut case — whether President Biden has the legal authority to cancel student debt.** Spoiler alert: _He does._ Congress wrote it into the HEROES Act, clear as day, that presidents can cancel student debt to respond to major emergencies. Like, oh, let’s say a global pandemic. Donald Trump used the same power when he was president, and we didn’t hear a single peep from any right-wing politicians or judges that it could be illegal. But now that President Biden’s trying to wield that authority to help working-class and middle-class people, GOP elected officials and billionaire-funded interests are suing to stop it. So I elevated stories that illuminate how student debt relief is clearly targeted to help people who are struggling financially from the pandemic. And I went to the Supreme Court steps on the day of oral arguments to say that the justices need to get out of the way, not play politics, and apply the law. As long as they do that, tens of millions of Americans will get some or all of their student debt canceled. But no matter what, I’m staying in the fight. **Two: The Supreme Court announced that they’ll consider whether the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau is constitutional.** Spoiler alert: _It is._ Year after year, corporate interests have funded desperate lawsuit after desperate lawsuit challenging the CFPB’s structure. All because they don’t want a strong watchdog keeping them from cheating working families. But in case after case, the corporate interests have failed. This one should be no exception. But if the Court ignores over a century of law and historical precedent, and if extreme right-wing justices decide to play politics and rule against the CFPB, it would throw our economy into chaos. You know, the CFPB has already put more than $12 BILLION back in the pockets of people who got cheated by financial institutions. That gives greedy corporations more than 12 billion reasons to stop the CFPB in its tracks. But it also gives us more than 12 billion reasons to fight back. Alongside this grassroots team and a terrific array of labor unions, civil rights groups, consumer advocates, and more, I fought tooth and nail to turn the CFPB from an unlikely idea to a concrete, consumer-protecting reality. And I won’t stop fighting to keep it that way. **Three: One single extremist judge down in Texas could ban mifepristone — a medication commonly used for abortions in America — across the entire country.** Mifepristone has been approved by the FDA for two decades. It’s been proven to be safe for medication abortions. But any day now, this Trump appointee could wake up, decide that he’s qualified to override the FDA’s scientific judgment, take mifepristone off the market nationwide, and make abortion care even more inaccessible for millions of Americans. Let’s be clear: After the Supreme Court said that abortion rights would be up to the states, we warned that the extremists wouldn’t stop here. They’d threaten reproductive freedom in every corner of the country, even in places like Massachusetts that have strong protections. And that’s exactly what this Trump judge could do with this case. But we won’t be out of options, no matter how he rules. After the Court overturned Roe v. Wade, I called on the Biden-Harris administration to expand access to medication abortion. They’re already taking action, and they have more tools they can use to keep protecting the right to an abortion. Now, notice what all three of these cases have in common: The danger that right-wing judges and justices could decide to substitute their own judgment for the judgment of elected officials and qualified experts. **Extremists have hijacked the judiciary, and they’re using it to advance a far-right agenda that they’d never be able to pass through Congress. They’re using it to rig the rules even more in favor of the rich and powerful, and they’re using it to rip away our freedoms.** But I’m fighting back, and I’m grateful you’re in this fight too. We can stay in the fight, no matter how these right-wing extremists rule. We can rebalance the Supreme Court by expanding it. We can use every possible tool to ensure relief for borrowers, protection for consumers, and reproductive freedom for all — including finally passing a bill to codify Roe v. Wade. [_**It’s all possible, as long as we all fight side by side. If it makes sense right now, can you pitch in $3 to support our campaign and help grow our movement?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59512587/394434754/-65073031?amount=3&refcode=EMZ11Z_SCO_E_20230302_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTM1NTVjMy0xM2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ab7inkEal3gi1PmIOHkvoaind169JSLgbBZcEABtWKY=) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59512588/394434762/-65073031?amount=3&refcode=EMZ11Z_SCO_E_20230302_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTM1NTVjMy0xM2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ab7inkEal3gi1PmIOHkvoaind169JSLgbBZcEABtWKY=)

Friend, I'm sweating like a sugar mill mule just thinking about all the **_bone-head decisions that are being made at the White House right now._ **

You can't blame me, though, because since Joe Biden put down his **WELCOME** mat at the White House, none of his policies have been that inviting to the American people. I mean, let's just take the price of gas, eggs, butter, airline tickets, chicken, and...well, you get the point.

Look, I don't dislike Joe Biden. I really don't. He just hasn't proven to me yet that he's qualified to be our Commander-in-Chief. So, with that being said, I want to let you know that there's no way that I'm ever going to stop fighting for a better tomorrow for you, your family, and your crazy uncle. **I 'd rather drink weedkiller.**

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: All these soft-on-China Democrats...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We aren’t messing around.

| |
---
| | Friend,

So many seem to be dancing around the issue but I'm not afraid to say this clearly and directly:

**Soft-on-China Democrats are turning a blind eye to the Chinese Communist Party invading our American way of life.**
1. Chinese businesses have bought up 350,000+ acres of American farmland - even near our classified military bases
2. Joe Biden let a Chinese spy balloon hover over our missile silos and nuclear facilities - he could have shot it down immediately
3. China-owned TikTok has collected the data from 80M Americans - and Democrats have attacked efforts to ban the app

_**[Majority Leader Scalise and I are working together, as a united front, to elect more tough Conservatives who actually have the guts to stand up to these Communists. If you agree we can't afford more spineless, weak-on-China Democrats in office, I'm personally asking you to make a donation to fuel our critical efforts.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsquf6rqo6igopjvgignoi7afcli1au90gtsvtt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctjm6ob3cth2bs "Majority Leader Scalise and I are working together, as a united front, to elect more tough Conservatives who actually have the guts to stand up to these Communists. If you agree we can't afford more spineless, weak-on-China Democrats in office, I'm personally asking you to make a donation to fuel our critical efforts.")**_

**Unfortunately, the weak-on-China special interests are DEEPLY entrenched so this won't be easy...**

_Adam Schiff just took to TikTok to beg for campaign cash... The Biden Administration admitted tracking the spy balloon from mainland China, but still did nothing for over a week... and Democrats attack me RELENTLESSLY for saying China is our biggest national security threat - they think climate change is more urgent... _

---
| | | [SUPPORT TOUGH-ON-CHINA REPUBLICANS >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ukcnsbibv38rl825r5sf309sv8d5tuoh0930h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctjm6ob3cth2bs "SUPPORT TOUGH-ON-CHINA REPUBLICANS")
---

Look.

As the former Secretary of State and Director of the CIA, I know how important it is to have a strong Congress that understands what's at stake. There's no doubt about it: Republicans are the only ones with the courage to go toe-to-toe with the Communists.

_**[That's why we need MORE of them in Congress. That's also why I'm teaming up with the Majority Leader- tomorrow is too late, we need your help right here and right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn55n8makhspoki1ig45a02l3ih73t105ahkkafg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctjm6ob3cth2bs "That's why we need MORE of them in Congress. That's also why I'm teaming up with the Majority Leader – tomorrow is too late, we need your help right here and right now.")**_

Onward,
Thank you,
Mike Pompeo,
_70th Secretary of State_

body:
Good morning, Bob Lorinser here, the Democrat running for Congress to represent one of the most critical types of cons
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/abOQXC_GD/c?w=QIMf_JJt5bdio55EaTHAQkb-XlfevgDYDWVsD5Pm_cg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS9zby9hYk9RWENfR0Q_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Rural Democrats need you the most, here's the best way to help
---
| | Good morning, Bob Lorinser here, the Democrat running for Congress to represent one of the most critical types of constituencies in America, people of the rural heartland. Allow me to explain why the future of Democrats is dependent on your support of initiatives like our Rural Fund...
---
| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/abOQXC_GD/c?w=itJ8FMU-6jUYbh6Zoscbq3wSWH6pi-jGrrVcYvx9vj8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjkwOTg5ZmNjLTk1NzctNGQzNi1iZTI5LWQzY2UxZmJmMzk1ZCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)

| | Our district in Northern Michigan and the UP (MI01) is one of the most beautiful in the country, but we lack a Congressperson willing to alleviate the pain of struggling rural communities. A MAGA insurrectionist has poorly represented MI01 in Washington since 2017. Before that, however, we were under solid Democratic representation for nearly two decades. I need your help getting us back on track. My campaign created [the Rural Fund](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/abOQXC_GD/c?w=i2P6zw4cfyyJSwAnYCy_UynqjNfAyicj6ouhA-I0syw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL1J1cmFsRnVuZCIsInIiOiJlOTJhOWJmYy1kODFkLTRlZGEtYTgyMC05Nzg0OWEwYWRiODYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ) not only on behalf of our district; but to spark a movement in the heartland that will advance shared Democratic principles in areas where candidates need it the most - in ruby-red, conservative districts. Voters here are fiercely independent; if we can reach them, there's no place riper to change the most minds. We've already laid a lot of groundwork, but as you know, Democrats have a lot of work to do to convince neglected voters they deserve better. Hardworking families get by with tenacity, grit, and perseverance. It's how they survive, but they deserve so much more. I'm running on affordable and accessible healthcare for all, childcare, education, and housing. I am a champion for worker's rights and livable wages. I'm a fierce fighter for conservation, an advocate for Great Lakes' protections, and environmental sustainability. I am a strong proponent of individual liberties, meaning I will stand tall to protect women's rights, the LGBTQ community, and fearful young people who are victims of the proliferation of depression and gun violence. I grew up in a working-class Midwest home and dedicated my life to public service - as a social worker, physician, diplomat, and public health director. If you've already contributed, thank you. If you're on board with what I'm fighting for, I need you in my corner now. I know it's early, but to compete against the GOP's corporate PACs and dark money, I'm seeking founding members of my campaign. If you need more information about our Rural Fund, [my background](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/abOQXC_GD/c?w=rqMLqQDc_o4cNq7Mz4S_aYiI7iWw4VvK1rZyiShJ7iE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly92b3RlcmJvYi5jb20vYWxsYWJvdXRib2IiLCJyIjoiZTkyYTliZmMtZDgxZC00ZWRhLWE4MjAtOTc4NDlhMGFkYjg2IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0), or my candidacy, visit [votedrbob.com](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/abOQXC_GD/c?w=zl34fiNBd3WmWrzC7Yih93R6Vnv4J-YCgt4SzvVIoE4.). I'm eager to connect with you one-on-one. I am accessible and available and will start virtual meetings with contributors like yourself in mid-April. Let me know if you're interested. For now, I will read and respond to this correspondence. Thank you . Happy to answer any question you might have. I appreciate your consideration. Regards, Bob LorinserCandidate for US Congress (MI01)
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: These are startling statistics
body:
There's startling statistics I want to share with you today, but don't worry, I also have some exciting news.

Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor?
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmeposg3m0nhmkondlthvs3f1483o94tl9licnbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge8o72cdh2bs) Hi there, Friend. There's startling statistics I want to share with you today, but don't worry, I also have some exciting news. First, the shocking stuff... Recent surveys show that 57% of Americans haven't read the Constitution. So when you are walking through your neighborhood, chances are good that in every house you pass, one person who lives there hasn't read one of our most important founding documents! But there's one more stat I'd like to give you...
26% cannot name a **single right** protected by the First Amendment--not freedom of religion, not free speech, not freedom of assembly--not a single one. These startling statistics show that if we hope to restore liberty in America, we must teach millions of our neighbors about the design and purpose of our Constitution. It's the only way to protect our freedom for the long term. That's why we've been working on a brand new way to do this...one that I'm excited to share with you today. For months, we have worked to produce a version of our most popular free online course, "**Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution** ," that we are airing on television networks nationwide. In other words, we are bringing **["Constitution 101" directly into the homes of millions of Americans. In fact, our current media plan has the spot reaching as many as 70 million households over one month!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze3df400ngrr4ov40ano2v9udiahcgbco4ouh2l8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge8o72cdh2bs)**
## Is television good for teaching young Americans how the Constitution works?
[YES](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn8drmfa0b3au29f9ov8r9j41s5im52a3a2knqgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge8o72cdh2bs) [NO](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv2udri3mhc34af78gscts2bsd2ki2voq5b6dfmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge8o72cdh2bs) Imagine citizens of all ages learning about the design and purpose of the Constitution...imagine them having the chance to understand the beauty of our founding documents and how they've been undermined. Most of all, imagine millions of people learning how we might revive limited government in our time! You can see why I'm excited about this and why it's so important that I share this with you today. This new effort is a major escalation of our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions...which has as its aim nothing less than educating as many of our fellow Americans as possible --so we can save our country.** This new television program redoubles our efforts to **reach** and **teach** citizens of all ages about the Constitution and liberty. It's also why we urgently need your support. You might be surprised to learn that airing "Constitution 101" on television networks isn't as expensive as you might think. To air the **_30-minute_ program** and other spots across dozens of networks for **one month** costs just **$275,000...total**. We've negotiated discount rates and identified networks that will be the most effective. Compare that to the $7 million businesses pay to have their 30-_second_ commercial shown once during the "big game." So, airing one 30-minute segment of "**Constitution 101** " on _FOX Business_ might cost as much as $9,000, while other networks cost just $200--which means your generous tax-deductible gift of $500, $250, $100, or even $50 will go a long way. **[With this in mind, will you help us fund our media budget and all of our other work in the Project to Defend Liberty?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn9d9tuukt0ot5fu13uc74q47t6mr7ve5p6iculo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge8o72cdh2bs)** **You can learn more about our plans and make your gift using this secure link:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/DRTV](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4jdt4n4t8t6b74blu0ogh8itlj5c6ivec620qa8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge8o72cdh2bs)** After reading those statistics, I'm sure you'll agree that our educational outreach on behalf of liberty, like free online courses, has **never** been more urgent than it is today. **As James Madison wrote, only "a well instructed people...can be permanently a free people."** We refuse EVERY PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants, so Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn and I are counting on you! Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zf3fkldqm0kr92udgbg6o3e948cevcjp49n34130).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbroeptrcc3jao0th5q53etclf5ofbou7fueh8g0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7ctjm1p30s9hm49fg)

---
| | | [**Florida’s state legislature just introduced a bill that is a direct attack on higher education. The bill mirrors Florida Governor and MAGA-enthusiast Ron DeSantis’ recent dangerous rhetoric and would take a sledgehammer to higher education as we know it. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0dab333a-dbbe-40e6-9f5b-c760b5b7deb3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This racist and sexist bill would ban all women's and gender studies majors, and more. If it passes, all courses must promote "the values necessary to preserve the constitutional republic through traditional, historically accurate" coursework and ban all courses based on "unproven, theoretical, or exploratory content." We can’t allow this authoritarian attack on our education system. We must prevent the GOP from erasing and whitewashing key parts of our history and society – these subjects must continue to be studied! **_[Add your name: Reject the GOP's plan to ban Women and Gender Studies from Florida colleges >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T55733e2f-c230-4bb6-8694-10549faecd43/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Change starts today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu3sdos2jq74hv4783q96p5q8bvguilg87vl68lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4o31c9h2bs)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6fe2qrp4o5eanqqmcs81cul8i9im2hi3ag8ola8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4o31c9h2bs)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhet51ba4tdi9nqd1mbhh0gb1s7ot84mthu6q400_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4o31c9h2bs)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl467fb4a0g15gkqoq7261827d5penbnl3n22v48_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4o31c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi99oab31g89st2sassdho5r4rb59cggfih6ocl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4o31c9h2bs)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER ->**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdl4c7i3mqsf9ua893mn98v6s49c3gbbo9pqgsd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4o31c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztva4hh9j1m0961otp4dofpd9lo33p0iugbh0580_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4o31c9h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z477g1gblsnh39q2sa28rvnitivbu2n5lueks4i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4o31c9h2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf3c9sfov7pc8nm3gila2vfkqog943bh2jlikmeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4o31c9h2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcftlqfo0b2ajk22su7m7vdbn1d5nvv3pfm51b00_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4o31c9h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Dodatkowo gracz powinien mieć dostęp do obsługi klienta również w sytuacji, gdy np. zapomni swoich danych do logowania. Spinamba Wszystkie polecane kasyna online z naszej strony oferują użytkownikom realne szanse na uzyskiwanie wygranych w ramach rzetelnej i bezpiecznej rozgrywki. Dobrze jednak, aby gracz również sam dysponował wiedzą, która pozwoli mu we własnym zakresie oceniać poszczególne witryny, dostrzegać ich mocne oraz słabe strony i porównywać je ze sobą. Na co więc przede wszystkim należy zwracać uwagę, wybierając legalne kasyno internetowe? W poniższej tabeli opisujemy pięć najważniejszych aspektów, które zawsze powinny być brane pod uwagę. 310 spinów bez obrotu SuperCat do 520% do 5000 zł + 220 darmowych spinów 17,5 miliony USD na slocie Arabian Nights; Kasyno online na pieniądze 255% do 300€ + 250 darmowych spinów Kind regards Oprócz opisanych powyżej wariantów promocyjnych prawie każde kasyno ma w swojej ofercie także promocje cykliczne oraz okolicznościowe. Mogą to być dopłaty do depozytów lub darmowe spiny w określone dni tygodnia, bonusy urodzinowe, promocje z okazji określonych świąt, bonusy na nowe produkcje kasynowe oraz mnóstwo innych, równie atrakcyjnych propozycji. 46 300% + 30 darmowych spinów Dlaczego nie warto grać w kasynach, które nie posiadają licencji? 50 darmowych spinów bez depozytu na Book of Sirens Popularny bonus powitalny najczęściej jest głównym aspektem oferty promocyjnej kasyna online. To właśnie ten rodzaj promocji oferuje graczom największe gratyfikacje. W przypadku pakietów powitalnych czasami można liczyć na sumy sięgające nawet 10 tysięcy złotych. Jak to działa? Kasyno może np. podwoić każdy z naszych 4 pierwszych depozytów (bonus powitalny 100%). Dodatkowo gracz często otrzymuje też Darmowa Kasa kasyno nie tworzy gier, a jedynie je udostępnia. UKGC 200% do 2000 zł + 100 spinów

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Change starts today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9fpa51beud6ggm7ke698ohrbruhfeq3lhpbmpao_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4p74c9h2bs)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvnu0hb539o3dpacj3rqurepskstgmjo2cjceiso_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4p74c9h2bs)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zklft6qrd3pvmbojmvkspv6jkqkia44n8h117178_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4p74c9h2bs)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg2m2td0a6ahq5cup012ghfsqk3kpq1coo10oin0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4p74c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcfo70o8jl3r3k5f8cs87p3dh5rtmsapgjvbscto_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4p74c9h2bs)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER ->**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5oekfonntstktqcal7kponqhrvsr1ms3snsvvug_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4p74c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgfiirc6bgp63abhtj088jihk6hboi7c1366lpb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4p74c9h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3kk7hedcnnsq24f504sl0bkcegabatfim1b0vh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4p74c9h2bs)| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq3jl787r3k7lkds36cjqf0akcchiku40lqbc9h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4p74c9h2bs)| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zipi4u37tgfpcvilqvdngb2bmoj6gh7eog4vl0u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4p74c9h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zsihijjmpd0e5u51qa4o1pnnhckcqb2kj1mtnleg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkpj8d2g9noghrn7da650nak0dbukbmgm8ih1ugo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctge4p74c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: My Houston Roots: The Port of Houston
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email]
Dear Friend,
As Black History Month comes to a close, we are releasing a collection of videos entitled My Houston Roots . This first video is focused on the role that Texas Southern University plays in the history of Houston and in my family history. TSU has educated so many leaders in our community and so many TSU students helped lead sit-ins to desegregate Houston. Check out this video where I discuss all things TSU - ranging from the media black out of the sit-ins during desegregation to how my parents met!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qoiCxH2hLhg [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qoiCxH2hLhg]
I hope you enjoy this story as much as I enjoyed sharing it. Please click here [https://youtu.be/qoiCxH2hLhg] to watch it.
Onward,
Amanda K. Edwards
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email]
Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. To learn more, visit our website. [https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGM5yj8j7wp9iTmm36KUUUjxRVs1k2ClWwooW7u7HQUXQ20_vV7WXIR0a2vN_9aawfuoQMFURdf0HB3Ltm-FAC6mS7xRC19Djsf6kePNlPzDxkle8RQk79yPECsdv0H3AVEql1F_RDzzOBlkrN8hwLTRPqiL0SN78Gzc-AyF-ND9Jmjj5Vya-HoQBOQMbpB8x4EAdkj9fxR5Db73pAdsVGoZWuI7FLjg9CahKw0yqJoi/3td/LcL_sLfvR-eH17tXI9KQyg/h8/MX4qR-D_iclOgTaB65F9F6UdLIBPWs48NRp6vo9GOBg]

name: Charles Booker
subject: FWD: National support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

As we approach the first end-of-quarter deadline of the year, I’m hoping
you’ll help us reach a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully
retiring our campaign debt.

I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the
campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure
those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight
together. First, I need your help.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18897?t=1001&akid=3021%2E346206%2EITETRi ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a
contribution before midnight.

Thank you!

Charles

--- Forwarded message ---

Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The
campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding
the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the
democratic process.

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky.
Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will
win.

But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of
donations we received, national support never came.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18897?t=1002&akid=3021%2E346206%2EITETRi ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution
so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our
fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to
make a contribution.

I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of
progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to
go.

Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m
excited to move on to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230302-3021-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3021_346206_ITETRi&akid=3021%2E346206%2EITETRi

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3021%2E346206%2EITETRi

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Pete Buttigieg MUST go!
body:
| | | [](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=6650f8cbf17f4e4295775a2df43f11c1&_e=aBoRZULyGMLDTy8pWTJG0o-qo_fybJmih3VjI991a-dUZDvKJgIVlU1pv6TdvddeLmk8gyCmV1tgqbkdO2w9KjvizQz-hvVuJaeDPpeoKJFGp3YTHurcdFq4sJ6TY0eyN2thWjYlC6WyXoRzIH23HXBuYLn0XQPNQb9APQt6QXKEKQu5nW9jICpByxmhb_w8w7mWegJZeacSbjJD689iESo9uG-wcZEF48eGs3G2LT4mA4qcy-JWWDNibrU_jnaToxf7Enq0YkOtrvyOqGWw-2lgjK6EV5Dre5Jvucr0Gf1-IQtt5UZBchMm1IJytbrxz-rGwrVtvByg5ZubPSkHN-EP1CJGXpuwKQUA1YGVHTgZWD3UuMPRnaGz9v4vgpJqRIfDXSZ-kHkJqnhm6-eA_Q%3D%3D)
---
[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=6650f8cbf17f4e4295775a2df43f11c1&_e=aBoRZULyGMLDTy8pWTJG0o-qo_fybJmih3VjI991a-dUZDvKJgIVlU1pv6TdvddeLmk8gyCmV1tgqbkdO2w9KjvizQz-hvVuJaeDPpeoKJFGp3YTHurcdFq4sJ6TY0eyN2thWjYlC6WyXoRzIH23HXBuYLn0XQPNQb9APQt6QXKEKQu5nW9jICpByxmhb_w8w7mWegJZeacSbjJD689iESo9uG-wcZEF48eGs3G2LT4mA4qcy-JWWDNibrU_jnaTGwpmkLCDI9ONPw3RRx9pzuWdeotaiY01jWASMLxZ-_Ceo7NJEGkfte7T8rx9hq90sY4uodAzVnoVOe5ihJZjbXp8qkd7LWIG1GjqodQqoAiWTjiDPMfEFyniVx2fnPir3LTt6XRcElB1YUHofA4SpQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
After the train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio, Americans from all over the country sprang into action to help those in need.

_But one person was noticeably absent..._**Secretary of Transportation Pete Buttigieg.**

He didn’t visit East Palestine for THREE WEEKS after the crisis, and that’s just the beginning of his failures.

**_Enough is enough._**

**I’m leading House Republicans in a resolution DEMANDING that he resign as Transportation Secretary.**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Power back in the people’s hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09555%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=azGtsBRPCz%2fjAPBco%2bwJ5A&sysid=1)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans-that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09555%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=azGtsBRPCz%2fjAPBco%2bwJ5A&sysid=1)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09556%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iJDSLCI281Gp802bcR9CyA&sysid=1)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09555%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=azGtsBRPCz%2fjAPBco%2bwJ5A&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09557%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bhiz5Nkx61gEZ6IPqIHnyA&sysid=1)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER →**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09555%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=azGtsBRPCz%2fjAPBco%2bwJ5A&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09558%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bd%2ffvsdtL4JsuHABK1Dmgg&sysid=1)

---

| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09559%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HyAuYz6lGlnJi1odpwzj0Q&sysid=1) | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09550%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3x%2bU3padrIjHaUGW2mHsZw&sysid=1) | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09551%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jgDnMQus9r%2fSqtqm7kkdug&sysid=1)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

|

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Power back in the people’s hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7v5c8s6jo9jlsan7n12vcrvuggv6rbdott3nk2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgecor2c3h2bs)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zttq0bupspnab2h0l389ce6amu1vg2tafsc6t2p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgecor2c3h2bs)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqm6902sht5vrp463ek20bokdhu09bb4igdp4lg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgecor2c3h2bs)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4rbl07vbjhf9sbic25im3ub5bq7c3dpsk8919sg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgecor2c3h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7pg0euqlk39mccq7ppsrqm8k9cnua17dr345ikg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgecor2c3h2bs)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zijmk2sbs6ugf84mg48s7uc4nu554atamhrl9rto_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgecor2c3h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5jfl8o07kv85a3r9uo048o59j3nmop2p3tkmgbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgecor2c3h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdep9l19kbio2mgt6hncfbn6p59t25u8r0h1pua0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgecor2c3h2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk2udcp8h19c2b4ds3cqra8k318na5sf003k3mvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgecor2c3h2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcl51r3lotq11fqo0jrklj3g2k98vpe6gjo9pa4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgecor2c3h2bs)
---|---|---

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: a personal note, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
Peter, I wanted to reach out today to send you a personal message. I hope you’ll take the time to read until the end.

---
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59540443/394472403/1662333042?refcode=20230302_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmU5MTJhMC0zMGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nas4y3hVL3c9-KcP2-9RpQPOVzC3w5FR3My8ayHmybU=)
---
Peter, I wanted to reach out today to send you a personal message. I hope you’ll take the time to read until the end.

I’m so incredibly humbled by all your support during my first months as your new Democratic Leader. I can’t tell you how much it means to me.
[**Together, we are building a movement that will reclaim the House for Democrats and restore our path to progress for working families.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59540444/394472404/1662333042?refcode=20230302_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmU5MTJhMC0zMGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nas4y3hVL3c9-KcP2-9RpQPOVzC3w5FR3My8ayHmybU=)

People from all walks of life are pitching in wherever they can. So many of you are making contributions, talking to your friends and neighbors, and helping to spread our message on social media. Already, I’ve received more than 50,000 donations from people all across the country.

Look, fundraising is easy for extreme MAGA Republicans who rake in cash from special interest groups. | | | Peter, Speaker Kevin McCarthy here. I'll make this quick.

Last year, voters across the country showed that they were fed up with Biden's ridiculous anti-American agenda. They put Republicans in control of Congress to shut him down - but if we miss another _critical_ deadline, **we will fail.**

Democrats are raking in dark money and using it to outspend us on _nearly every front._ Republican resources are being pushed to the brink, and if we fail, Biden will continue to wreak havoc on America's middle class.

I'm only sending this SOS to the most loyal patriots because I know I can trust you. This is your _last_ chance to help Republicans survive the Left's fundraising surge - please, **it 's all over without you.**

The choice is yours. If you don't do something to help us now, we have no hope of halting Biden and Schumers' radical plans for America.

Can you rush a donation by midnight to defend America and shut down Biden's agenda, once and for all?

name: Jon Tester
subject: You don’t need ten fingers to know right from wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Can I tell you a little story about me?
| | |
---
Hi there, can I tell you a little story about me?
I grew up on my family’s farm and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me.
When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there – but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor.
Here’s why I’m telling you this: just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts, **my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government.**
With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency.
**I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state and across the country.**
**[I’m officially running for reelection, so here’s the part where I ask: Can you split a donation between Maggie Hassan and me to become a Founding Donor of my campaign to help us block Mitch McConnell from retaking the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59506324/394411785/239556039?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2219-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmE0NTVkMS0wOGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrgEcDM4S8MFWCLtD_6nsxj2wOsNKYxR8jMAW1UdBes=) **
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59506325/394411786/239556039?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2219-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmE0NTVkMS0wOGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrgEcDM4S8MFWCLtD_6nsxj2wOsNKYxR8jMAW1UdBes=)
---
You don’t need ten fingers to know right from wrong and you can bet I’m going to spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country.
I appreciate your support, and anything you can pitch in today will go a long way for our grassroots campaign.
Thanks again,
Jon

clean_body: Can I tell you a little story about me? | | | Hi there, can I tell you a little story about me? I grew up on my family’s farm and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me. When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there – but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor. Here’s why I’m telling you this: just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts, my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government. With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency. I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state and across the country. = | | = You don’t need ten fingers to know right from wrong and you can bet I’m going to spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country. I appreciate your support, and anything you can pitch in today will go a long way for our grassroots campaign. Thanks again, Jon | | = | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can . Click here to . Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. Paid for by Maggie for NH |

clean_body: Democrats won THREE special elections in Connecticut – defending three critical seats in the House! | | | | | BIG NEWS: Democrats won THREE special elections in Connecticut – defending three critical seats in the House! We’re thrilled – Democrats have cinched victories in special elections nationwide – from Pennsylvania and Virginia to Connecticut and New Hampshire – and we’re only getting started! But we can’t slow down now – Republicans are pouring money into the states, and the GOP just launched attack ads in Virginia ahead of this fall’s ultra-competitive elections. It’s critical that we continue building our momentum now, so we can give our candidates the support they need to go toe-to-toe against extremist Republicans in elections across the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | With enough grassroots support, we can replicate Tuesday night's incredible victories in upcoming elections – but it’ll take the full strength of this people-powered movement to WIN against the GOP’s outsized spending. – Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. **After looking for homes in the 3rd District which includes Hampton, Newport News, Norfolk, Portsmouth and Chesapeake, Virginia.

Jasmine and I are here to stay in Newport News, Virginia.

We are in the heart of the district and we will never be re-districted out. My commitment to this area and the country is firm.

name: Jessica Anderson, Heritage Action
subject: 2022 Annual Impact Report Attached 📎
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
This is my favorite part of the job because I get to reach to out to our network of over 2 million grassroots activists| | | |
---
Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this **[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ea5ee6f8c5c2481287dc2f12ce0aedec&_e=m0GQtS9PA53SOjIxEaw5HM0txkON7FzpOvQW1OkY3yedwZttOvBXP9AB-g84cyEpIHryPHUMlYdi1LXhYY0aGtA1STxWcZOshgYoYVlz8iqsFD9VzU-fRTPm-gcVdnU17NuEhHNvnmIY1z78_6fxuw3LnEiaY3IQyhs7w2XW50SHfrY4-96D7j8KgRImI0hoqdMCYi5heLQj0PkTiYRFCvPUCupoQvA6tyed7J_hpa21VCc7i7SguKp6onFumLAFTGOFUETOKPNOyJwtTIduCdzhs46bZZl0B_kkZAljeDhOv7IoXsQhiF1PC888LxuOE5jKlM5tU-YqjunWQeuqYWLJbapeCtl6qMfQL9AefDudl7rv3oP2FVAB5X2_c0JX)**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ea5ee6f8c5c2481287dc2f12ce0aedec&_e=m0GQtS9PA53SOjIxEaw5HJ5JglG3HLAm_cPz-N92qHS7MyE-Q0jL2JJoRt15Wn65Ffg11ZbbtLQFZ9b2DGkiqMS6DVUO8G7DDJKS5nHVf6mX-Ld8UqnQg4tMFJ65fJ_q2orBduK0On1h85r190mWFtZnhGpWLQhdsEZqPCDefGxhRHv72qXKuWSHeYGi8DogeZwHq-as9nU3cWicvd2ILDmgOiijQI7OfM6FLhMFi4FQNd8fPB26HO2L7cia_UtPPG-B9INdIRRPnaYRy2zS-sBjkBnzfvx72eZJZPJypF26594IlpNdAQB6BQgoyFbOoj0XNmKyZ0u4jjECQ_MKLOMA29i5Qbnszzne-IyPqbE%3D)
---
Peter, we just released our 2022 Annual Impact Report, and I’m very excited to share it with you. This is my favorite part of the job because I get to reach out to our network of over 2 million grassroots activists and donors and show them the incredible amount of work we were able to accomplish together. **Last year in Washington, Heritage Action released 13 key votes, emphasizing legislative issues such as:** 🔔 Preserving the filibuster 🔔 Protecting life 🔔 Encouraging “no” votes on omnibus and spending packages 🔔 Supporting women's and girls' sports 🔔 Defending the 2nd Amendment🔔 Fighting inflated and economically dangerous COVID “relief” legislation🔔 Supporting American businesses and fighting the CHIPS Act 🔔 Protecting the institution of marriage and religious liberties🔔 Reinforcing the American economy and fighting Biden’s mislabeled, destructive policies
---
[**BECOME A HERITAGE ACTION MEMBER**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ea5ee6f8c5c2481287dc2f12ce0aedec&_e=m0GQtS9PA53SOjIxEaw5HJ5JglG3HLAm_cPz-N92qHS7MyE-Q0jL2JJoRt15Wn6583RlWByXQ4vn5Z35WKn9_Xv1Rf_5foxTiDd-RhV8ossSG9KuNKYuw1JBsJVKLcoL0K4WXr4lnPV2ZPzmNJsJnRXhnE4F3YhU9d5CQ2kxktVChy-FnF6wK0ArjwXy6iMmRgqxjt7c_KMdZu3fhqkccP9jbGsNCF9T_zOMXEzU9bCfmSSyey3xW_kjhTHGK_PbmnqutfQQMsXsCsRd-aFTg1CpUFxcwtsluM7VkGHQVNithT39iRBdFO3xDHP1U4vDHFpX4Nx6GvTrU0rFZvwi_hqT6CIDre2r29PRDcRPGRosJ4jzT7cw32wFNI72bLN9)
---
| | **At the state level, our 2022 legislative wins include: ** 🔔 Stronger election integrity laws in eleven states🔔 Education reforms, including ESA expansions and school choice in five states🔔 Protecting states from the burdensome and woke “ESG metrics” in two states🔔 Protecting life by passing pro-life legislation after the _Dobbs_ decision in three states🔔 Advocating for fairness in women's sports in four states
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ea5ee6f8c5c2481287dc2f12ce0aedec&_e=m0GQtS9PA53SOjIxEaw5HJ5JglG3HLAm_cPz-N92qHS7MyE-Q0jL2JJoRt15Wn6583RlWByXQ4vn5Z35WKn9_Xv1Rf_5foxTiDd-RhV8ossSG9KuNKYuw1JBsJVKLcoL0K4WXr4lnPV2ZPzmNJsJnRXhnE4F3YhU9d5CQ2kxktVChy-FnF6wK0ArjwXy6iMmRgqxjt7c_KMdZu3fhqkccBTwHqeQE6U69ecChqw8u-nGBEwttWaQYCStPIXXrc7JN6l4BwuDM4hJmQio11pDuqOsaIvbyqAEnDRGJtzmSoK3QnmzYaJxzl7uKMrldPHFN9m-nSXRXM2m1--WpP20nz3xASfy8dDCor3mHiIX0OxaEDfCgrZnnVs6PGrJ_tbA)
---
On the grassroots side, we also saw tremendous success and growth from our Sentinel program to our public comment campaigns, and it’s all thanks to activists like you, Peter.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ea5ee6f8c5c2481287dc2f12ce0aedec&_e=m0GQtS9PA53SOjIxEaw5HJ5JglG3HLAm_cPz-N92qHS7MyE-Q0jL2JJoRt15Wn6583RlWByXQ4vn5Z35WKn9_Xv1Rf_5foxTiDd-RhV8ossSG9KuNKYuw1JBsJVKLcoL0K4WXr4lnPV2ZPzmNJsJnRXhnE4F3YhU9d5CQ2kxktVChy-FnF6wK0ArjwXy6iMmRgqxjt7c_KMdZu3fhqkccOitiYa9l3eZSKU0rNt02KBZXVEnII9UVAtFwois_Zvfd_GAAYqfPpTtpvvtfE-vfJJ12tio2riK2IA8PIXWY_9IySWS5QUfhzwf7BFKNTWNs8ZD2gvdH89fzW2_3I2lyWvMKlTIlA5jvEtawby-Md2i2cvsIgxN9JRMUtGXxAnR)
---
Peter, there are a lot of organizations to which you could dedicate your hard-earned money and time, so we appreciate you supporting the critical efforts here at Heritage Action. **That’s why we strive each and every day to honor the trust that thousands of patriots across the country have granted to us.**
---
[**BECOME A HERITAGE ACTION MEMBER**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ea5ee6f8c5c2481287dc2f12ce0aedec&_e=m0GQtS9PA53SOjIxEaw5HJ5JglG3HLAm_cPz-N92qHS7MyE-Q0jL2JJoRt15Wn6583RlWByXQ4vn5Z35WKn9_Xv1Rf_5foxTiDd-RhV8ossSG9KuNKYuw1JBsJVKLcoL0K4WXr4lnPV2ZPzmNJsJnRXhnE4F3YhU9d5CQ2kxktVChy-FnF6wK0ArjwXy6iMmRgqxjt7c_KMdZu3fhqkccO7ViCLA5WYHqOo8eDlp4OlYviufHgkEHVhWALFHeZ4pa2jCMtIGvjQ9HKSlJXybV9h0pG36NPZ3ypf3VCAp2iac9bQs-_dbCz4N5ra1YlRMlrmWpD4tszM6YoleOsvyrKMts6bldEs_VI34Q05u0uRH_xWwF3lNVru2NhAf138s)
---
Eternally grateful,Jessica Anderson,Executive Director | Heritage Action **P.S.** If you’d like to read the full 2022 Annual Impact Report, we’ve attached a downloadable PDF file [_**here**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ea5ee6f8c5c2481287dc2f12ce0aedec&_e=m0GQtS9PA53SOjIxEaw5HLd5KmfTj1hlAG2IU8_TD0MJvFiEgwCI-K1SWe6QeFRY-QFcpj5qzr6ltPbp9zQLK1WdaezJ9jy1jfvIZOkE6Nr4I9Nh781da6812bE7Avkxmpc5VuDYSrWs-J3iTG5_sEz04DadMLAjV4ZgvI-2beFFOhLn-sqs8vL6o4Bp5R9FnzJCNpxfp2dD6w6tirsFqKL1C9j4IyjqGHrrr8waDM9AdMz-U-lJXN-srndTmOm3FE6p2_8N5OOgsAGHNJCmlG42zD4BxXSmCa5dVQkfQjeidItrasLZHc5cOv9P4AOB1cgilid8cIEMz0X6Ylbn1w%3D%3D).

|

name: Andy Beshear
subject: If we can keep up this progress …
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I just want to say thank you. Peter — I just want to take a moment to say thank you. We just closed the books on February, and I am blown away by the support we've received this year.

We wouldn't be where we are today without the thousands of grassroots supporters who believe in our ability to build a better Kentucky.

Our average online contribution for 2023 is $36.62! The fact that we have been able to build this campaign just one donation at a time speaks to the commitment and strength of this grassroots movement. I'm up against a dozen Republican opponents this year, including a self-funded billionaire. So every single dollar counts and better prepares our team for a hard-fought race.

I know that donating isn't always possible, and I appreciate those who still find a way to show their support. Our supporters help us out in countless ways:

Contributing a couple of dollars, sharing our ActBlue page, wearing something from our online store, or simply talking to friends, family, and neighbors about what we're doing here in Frankfort to fight for Kentuckians across the Commonwealth – your support is the reason why we're starting this election year off strong.

If we can keep up the momentum of the first months of 2023, I have no doubt we can win this November and protect the progress we've made for Kentucky.

Again — thank you,

Andy [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59507419/394416721/1737192232?refcode=em23_230301_eomty_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230301_eomty_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=34223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQxZWVlOC0wYWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wi4xaMrU7rL0cF91zX2UUFZUlLKYfVt8CtJwDhKn_wA=)

name: Beth B.
subject: Will Michigan Democrats be held accountable?
body:
And now they are threatening to force through an anti-gun agenda that would make California blush.

---
| | | | | | |
---
|
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm6c9au9ok6a9a0s99g3rokc4ufiuiu40qijuhbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgeeoj4cdh2bs)

Dear Fellow Patriot,

Democrats have gone mad with power in Michigan after achieving paper-thin majorities in the midterm elections.

And now they are threatening to force through an anti-gun agenda that would make California blush.

Bills for "Red Flag" gun confiscation, universal gun registration, and mandatory storage laws are already filed.

However, Democrats are threatening to take it even further -- salivating at the thought of passing an outright ban on commonly-owned semi-auto firearms.

We all know that a gun ban bill is already written and sitting ready on the desk of a Democrat lawmaker that won't even blink at the prospect of violating their oath of office and the U.S. Constitution by forcibly taking away your Second Amendment rights.

**[So join the effort by signing up and making your most generous contribution to help recall ANY Michigan lawmaker that votes for these radical anti-gun measures](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt4jd2at8duvba07noeitb1477jnu7p2ch6oi998_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgeeoj4cdh2bs)**.

As you know, "Red Flag" gun confiscation orders (SB 83-86) allow an old roommate, ex-spouse, ex-girlfriend, or ex-boyfriend to file an order against someone with very little evidence and strip someone of their rights without due process.

The so-called 'universal background checks' bills (SB 76-78) are de facto universal gun registration and will make it illegal to loan a close relative or friend a shotgun for hunting.

Finally, the storage laws (SB 79 and 80) disarm law-abiding Michiganders in their own homes and are probably already unconstitutional under the Heller decision.

But this kind of tyranny comes with a catch.

_Michigan law allows voters to recall their elected officials for their behavior in Lansing_.

And I certainly consider lawmakers violating their oath of office and the Constitution a recallable offense!

So if Democrats, or even any Republicans, decide to trample all over our Second Amendment rights here in Michigan, we don't have to wait until 2024 to hold them accountable.

With enough grassroots energy recall elections could be held as early as summer!

I'm already talking with local activists across the state and they are excited about the potential for holding Democrats accountable via a recall if they force their radical anti-gun agenda into law.

But even a massive swell of grassroots volunteers will not cover all the costs of a serious recall effort.

**[This is why I am asking you to stand with Michigan gun owners by signing up and financially supporting the recall of oath-breaking, anti-gun politicians in Lansing](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk88uhm9jccqvs06lgb3djv9j4mbt3cijq1a0uag_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgeeoj4cdh2bs)**.

**[Your contribution of just $20 or $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj9nkale18tkcu3tmftt8rr5d5nh48q3j358ani8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgeeoj4cdh2bs)** will help Great Lakes Gun Rights kick-start any necessary recall on politicians who attempt to eliminate Second Amendment Rights.

And if you can afford it, **[$5 or even $10](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsv1l9cbkn1qpnfp0hds0l6pbh89pv197rihon48_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgeeoj4cdh2bs)** would go the extra distance to help gather the thousands of necessary signatures to trigger a recall election.

Our list of recall supporters is growing every day, and some have even been able to **[go all in with donations of $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi0v4nskoua2qjbtha0k4h2j1tqover5gj234o48_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctgeeoj4cdh2bs)** or more!

But, I know that is not possible for everyone, especially with the rising costs of inflation.

So whatever you can afford, know that your contribution will help Great Lakes Gun Rights defend the Second Amendment from any oath-breaking lawmakers in Lansing!

Thank you for your support of gun rights here in Michigan.

**For Freedom,

Brenden Boudreau
Executive Director
Great Lakes Gun Rights**

Democrats have gone mad with power in Michigan after achieving paper-thin majorities in the midterm elections.

They are threatening a radical anti-gun agenda having already filed bills for "Red Flag" gun confiscation, universal gun registration, and mandatory storage laws -- while teasing an outright ban on commonly-owned semi-automatic firearms.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m so grateful for your support of Giffords
#

I want to reach out and thank this community for the outpouring of support we received ahead of our February fundraising deadline.
Hundreds of you answered our calls to action and because of your generous contributions, we were able to reach our February fundraising goal.
Right now, we’re at a crossroads for the gun safety movement in our nation. We have a president who is willing and ready to sign transformative legislation into law—just like we saw last summer with the passage of the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act.
However, with a narrowly divided Senate and a Republican majority in the House, it is going to be a challenge for us to keep making progress.
But we cannot give up in the fight. That’s why your contributions to Giffords are so important. Your support goes directly towards our work to keep our communities safe from gun violence by allowing us to invest in candidates with the courage to act, organize at the state and local level, mobilize voters, and so much more.
[**If you didn’t have the chance to contribute to Giffords last month, you can click here to make a contribution today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230302-1-15&t=2&akid=4347%2E3935704%2E09fuV7)
All that you do to support Giffords means so much to me. Thank you for being with me in this fight.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=4347%2E3935704%2E09fuV7) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Troy E. Nehls
subject: Texas Independence Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Take a second to let me know why you love Texas.
| | | _You know how it goes:_ The stars at night are big and bright ... **DEEP IN THE HEART OF TEXAS!** It’s Texas Independence Day, when we celebrate the fact that we’re all American by birth, and Texan by the grace of God. I’d love it if you took a second to share this day with me, and why you call Texas home.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/6fedb9d4a8e6f554/1103c7fdbd19c543c3d6b838967d376c/35193)
---
**For me, our economic prosperity and America First values make Texas the best state in the country** – [let me know why you love being a Texan!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/6fedb9d4a8e6f554/26c3d8fbcc2469b8c3d6b838967d376c/35193) – Troy E. Nehls

Lamont has fought for Virginians every day he’s been elected to office. He’s ready to take the next step and represent the Ninth Senate District. We need to make sure we get out the word to every Democrat in SD-09 to make sure Delegate Bagby wins. = VADEMS ******=****** ******=******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. body:

#

Please don’t click away. This is the 1st time we’re emailing about this month’s FEC deadline, so we’ll get straight to the point: we’re asking for you to help us file the best fundraising report possible.

If everyone reading this donated even $3, we would not only file an FEC report that shocked the world and led to a lot of new endorsements, but we would have the resources to WIN this race and wouldn’t have to ask for donations for months.
But not everyone gives. So we’re relying on people who understand how important this race is to chip-in before our FEC deadline.

Elissa and I got to know each other in 2018 as we both flipped red districts in the Blue Wave. We connected instantly because we had similar stories about why we ran for Congress. She also ran for office to fix our healthcare system - her mom had stage IV ovarian cancer and it drained their family savings.
Since then, I’ve had the privilege of working alongside Elissa in Congress - and she is a rockstar. She has led the charge with me pushing back against corruption (she also doesn’t take a dime of corporate PAC money) and we’ve been in the trenches together comparing notes on how to win in toss-up districts. I consider her a friend and a confidante, and I’m so excited she’s running for Senate.
I believe Elissa is exactly the kind of leader we need to break through Republican obstruction and actually get things done in the U.S. Senate. **And did I mention that winning this Michigan seat is going to be essential if we want to keep the Senate blue next year?**
[**That’s why I’m asking you to please split a donation between mine and Elissa’s campaign to help us win both of our incredibly important races!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59542443/394482425/913222836?refcode=E20459-20230302-ElissaSlotkin-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmY5MjA2ZDgtMzliOS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rV0YJq3HJt4B2UbA0Fpu5hxRUUXFJtC-dWyMv9dJSrE=)
Your support is critical,
\- Josh

Peter,

**Joe Biden continually FAILS to protect our nation and the American people.**_Just look at the southern border. _

We all know that the border is _wide open_ and has never been less secure, but apparently, that won't stop Biden from shamelessly lying to the American people about it so that he can push amnesty for MILLIONS of illegals.

We can build a wall around the Capitol to keep pretending our citizens are an ongoing threat, but we can't build a wall at our border where we know there are actual threats. _That tells you everything you need to know about the government._

_With everything happening in our country right now, we must secure our border again._

I'm reaching out to YOU, a dedicated Republican, to complete the **Official 2023 Border Security Survey.**
