name: Tom Fitton
subject: Standing firm for the rule of law
body:
I know your share our commitment to fighting public corruption and standing firm for the rule of law.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I know that your share our commitment to fighting public corruption and standing firm for the rule of law.
And frankly, because of the critical importance of our mission right now we _are really counting on you to stand with us again_!
[**Can I count on you to give your support to our work with a special contribution today?**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62403&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62403&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

We need your help right now because, in this historic time, no one is doing more than Judicial Watch to uncover unlawful government secrecy, and protect the rule of law, including the honesty of our elections and our laws that forbid discrimination based on race:

* _We continue to successfully fight in the courts for the release of records_ about U.S. Government contacts with, and federal grants given to, the **Wuhan Institute of Virology** , which even the Biden Energy Department has now grudgingly conceded was most likely the source of a laboratory leak that led to the Covid-19 pandemic.

* _Our election integrity team_ is reviewing state and federal election data to determine if more states are failing to clean their voter rolls, as federal law requires...and if we find they, we will "warn" them and, if necessary, sue them in federal court to force compliance with this critical election law.

* _We are suing the Minneapolis Public Schools and the Minneapolis Board of_ _Education_ for violating the Equal Protection Guarantee of the Minnesota Constitution over a teachers' contract that provides **discriminatory job protections to certain racial minorities.**

Clearly, this is all critically important work. _And Judicial Watch is America 's best (some would say only) bet to get to the truth on these and other important matters_. But we are already carrying the largest investigation and litigation caseload in our 29-year history, and [**we cannot do it without your help.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62403&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62403&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

The pressures on us right now are tremendous, as we are literally taking on battles that no one else will...certainly _not_ the hard-left Biden Justice Department and its FBI, _not_ the corrupted media and _not_ the divided Congress!.

That's why your willingness to make a special contribution today is so important. _[Judicial Watch needs your support today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62403&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)... and so does America_!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62403&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

name: Corey DeAngelis, Senior Fellow AFC
subject: Why they’re so afraid of school choice

body:

| | Hi Peter,
I recently spoke with Fox News about the problem with teachers unions, and I didn't hold back. Power-hungry teachers unions consistently fight to trap kids in the failing government schools they staff. Their opposition to parental rights in education has everything to do with maintaining their control over the minds of other people's children. It's all about power. Teachers unions are more interested in protecting the status quo and serving their own interests than helping students succeed. Enough is enough. They've overplayed their hand and now we are freeing families from the clutches of the teachers unions once and for all. At the American Federation for Children, we're taking power over education away from teachers unions and putting it back into the hands of parents one state at a time. Already this year, we've helped deliver HUGE wins in Iowa and Utah and right now we're fighting tooth and nail to pass a brand-new program in Arkansas and protect school choice in Arizona. **[_I 'm asking you to join the most important fight of our generation by pledging a donation of any amount. Can we count on your support today?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62384875:6G5m_3GAN:m:1:3331421248:7923CE8886F97082C7948DE7F7332F82:r)**

body:

| Peter, **I'm going LIVE in just a few minutes at 4:30PM EST/1:30PM PST for my Common Ground Podcast.** Today, we will discuss protecting the citizens of New Jersey from dangerous pop-up car ‘rallies’, which are more like riots...and safeguarding innocent children in the Garden State from the wildly inappropriate indoctrination intended to corrupt their innocence.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO OPEN THE COMMON GROUND STREAM NOW (I'LL BE LIVE AT 4:30PM EST)](https://xtz223.keap-link010.com/v2/click/98449ad165a413a082acdc3ae60a25d3/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW0vi1yJ3IiKiuYhah808akjHYXxKJv73xgpXBW3fO_dc7gSEspKUcQjhTg_X9cACjUwogZLiVlLFXl838B3PsaAW8pbqtlcQTl_DK7Cc_a1nAY0KDXHYR3GelempyMrcgKrSpuI_TeCsmmQXZQXM808vNoKSwag7CEn3uOzhwmyio64NfyVSXWjbrG2aVl5Mh-QbVvdnuxYDGkGlFEr-2Z7j-NbMT4VOYn4=)

|

|

I'll be joined by Assemblyman Antawn McClellan to discuss what he’s doing to prevent pop-up rallies and the fatalities that stem from them and how you can help. I’m also happy to announce that Grassroots leader Fran Deacon and School Board Member Sal Piarulli will also be joining me to address the crucial topic of protecting our children from being exposed to perverted material in school libraries and the curriculum pushed into the classrooms.
---
|
---
| Together, we will discuss the ways we can protect our streets, safeguard the innocence of our kids, and ensure that future NJ school kids receive education that aligns with our family and community values. Hello,

Well, it didn’t take long. **The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began.**

It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024.

Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors.

I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies.
**We’ve set a goal of getting 25,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now:**
**[Please, if you’re able to, will you split $15 or more right now – any amount you can afford – between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to help us hit our goal and defeat Lauren Boebert?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59512934/394436014/-321553144?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2322-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhZmVkNGZmLTEzYjktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1etY7s9LPL-xAJjSvzzjsnH_IetsdsX1e0waafXTzlI=)**

name: Dan Kildee
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi,

I wanted to take a moment to thank all those who chipped in last month, helping us hit our February budget goal.

Your support is essential to helping us keep up our around-the-clock organizing here in mid-Michigan. Our district will remain one of the most competitive House races across the country, and Michigan will once again be a major battleground state in 2024 with a presidential race and an open U.S. Senate race. I’m so appreciative of supporters like you who help us lay the groundwork for victory.

Last November, we saw what Michigan Democrats can do when they invest early and run smart campaigns. Thanks to your support, we’ve started this cycle strong and are on our way to another blue wave here in Michigan going into 2024!

Thank you so much for your support,
Dan

_P.S. If you didn’t get the chance to donate before our deadline, or you want to double down on your support of our campaign,**[click here to chip in at the start of our Federal Election Commission quarterly push this March.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59514873/394440353/-630420539?amount=15&contactdata=qhEuaGU4kslGGdZNpONePHFJK1Cv5sIWKG+EvuCKDJCamMXsAw+QlIlUMDLwm/+RkDiqylqn4fCmLnR+piAYiIuJ1rldwa+VtrCo5h07r7+jj5rwXH3ALU86V5H/1R25KafHj3NDlPR2XqrKYVHJeA==&refcode2=a52f7878-17b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230302_TY_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_TY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTJmNzg3OC0xN2I5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RD7WDowhTnIyuJ_e9OtJW9Jvn9ZW_BCfkWaycS0X9hs=)**_

Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! name: Josh Hawley
subject: re: reaching out again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
I don’t have much time, but this is important.

| | | Fellow American, I don’t have much time, but this is important.

Our extended end of month deadline is **[TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv1gqmte7uq6r0k2ujc93mr5j41s5mhkesjtad60_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctie4pb5cjh2bs)** , and we need EVERY PATRIOT to step up to make this opportunity worth it.

Fellow American, I'm a top target for Senate Democrats in 2024, and they’re rooting for us to fail.

_But I know you’re not one to give up just from a little pressure._

We only have a few hours, so time is running out.

Please, pitch in NOW so we can meet our EXTENDED goal before [**MIDNIGHT TONIGHT::** :](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcdoalsqcrs6ghuor05boc2eevmusug0qa3ed2j8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctie4pb5cjh2bs) **[https://secure.winred.com/josh-hawley-committee/eeom-1-pa](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmi8m79ksi01osovfpmmfgudp2ob3v4o8lj8ge80_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctie4pb5cjh2bs)** Thank you,

Fellow American, I'm a top target for Senate Democrats in 2024, and they’re rooting for us to fail. But I know you’re not one to give up just from a little pressure. We only have a few hours, so time is running out. Please, pitch in NOW so we can meet our EXTENDED goal before Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | Protect abortion rights by electing Democratic pro-choice women leaders [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59515537/394440924/-630742552?sourceid=1048700&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2E3NjgxMi0xOGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXg1KQkA4O6Mr0y2bHs0BHIBj5PpgjqLByeW8lNLSfs=&emci=4ba76812-18b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=53a76812-18b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) **BREAKING POLL ALERT:** Over 60% of Americans support rights to abortion access! Peter: A new poll released this week shows that nearly 7 in 10 Americans support state-level ballot measures to protect abortion rights. That means the majority of Americans are committed to protecting reproductive rights — but that hasn't stopped anti-choice Republicans from ramping up their attacks.

**Former Vice President Mike Pence has said he would sign a national abortion ban as president and supports banning abortion pills. And a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas is currently considering whether to ban mifepristone — a safe medication used in abortions — for millions of Americans.**

_We can't stand by and let this happen._ We know that the fight for reproductive freedom won't be easy — but with your support, we can fight back against anti-choice Republicans.

**[That's why we're running our own poll to send a clear message to the GOP that Americans support abortion rights. But we need 5,000 responses by midnight tonight, and we're still missing yours, Peter. Please, tell us now:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59515539/394440925/-630742552?sourceid=1048700&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2E3NjgxMi0xOGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXg1KQkA4O6Mr0y2bHs0BHIBj5PpgjqLByeW8lNLSfs=&emci=4ba76812-18b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=53a76812-18b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59515540/394440926/-630742552?sourceid=1048700&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2E3NjgxMi0xOGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXg1KQkA4O6Mr0y2bHs0BHIBj5PpgjqLByeW8lNLSfs=&emci=4ba76812-18b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=53a76812-18b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) Thank you so much for helping us continue our crucial work.

name: Michael Macellaio
subject: See you Monday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
The 2023 Party Builder Awards is coming up THIS MONDAY!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/lbBlLui13iEGtp8lGcBRvN4c9Ora83vRY29rO9LJIoU=/BOsTO8ONQX7fyGVqM6F5HwSaWrMvsBzycqpVZYrqNJk=?refcode=EM_EV_230302PB2_N_MM_90DO_5_NG_N_Logo)
Fellow Democrat, I hope you have made time in your busy schedule to join me at the IDCCA's 2023 Party Builder Awards **this Monday at the Chicago Navy Pier!**

I am honored to be one of this year's honorees, along with my friend **Deborah Cosey-Lane** of Amalgamated Transit Union Local 308! It's sure to be an amazing event, and I cannot wait to see you all there.

**[If you have not already bought your ticket, you can click this link to RSVP NOW.](https://act.myngp.com/el/lbBlLui13iEGtp8lGcBRvN4c9Ora83vRY29rO9LJIoU=/-lthWxJ8v-zaGlIjLlASRGW1mYDlhwsqa-LiFX6QEA8=?refcode=EM_EV_230302PB2_N_MM_90DO_5_NG_N_L1)** [**RSVP NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lbBlLui13iEGtp8lGcBRvN4c9Ora83vRY29rO9LJIoU=/-lthWxJ8v-zaGlIjLlASRGW1mYDlhwsqa-LiFX6QEA8=?refcode=EM_EV_230302PB2_N_MM_90DO_5_NG_N_B1&amount=10)

_**Please join us for IDCCA 's 2023 Party Builder Awards**_

**WHEN:** Monday, March 6th from 5:30 pm - 7:00 pm

**WHERE:** Offshore Rooftop, 1000 E Grand Ave, Chicago

**Honorary Event Co-Chairs:** Tim Drea, President of the Illinois AFL-CIO & Bob Reiter, President of the Chicago Federation of Labor

**Honorary Event Host Committee:** Hon. JB Pritzker, Hon. Juliana Stratton, Hon. Kwame Raoul, Hon. Alexi Giannoulias, Hon. Susana Mendoza, Hon. Mike Frerichs, Hon. Don Harmon, Hon. Emanuel "Chris" Welch, Hon. Lisa Hernandez, and Hon. Toni Preckwinkle

**RSVP HERE:****[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2023partybuilderawards](https://act.myngp.com/el/lbBlLui13iEGtp8lGcBRvN4c9Ora83vRY29rO9LJIoU=/-lthWxJ8v-zaGlIjLlASRGW1mYDlhwsqa-LiFX6QEA8=?refcode=EM_EV_230302PB2_N_MM_90DO_5_NG_N_L2)**

See you Monday!

Michael Macellaio
President, Chicago & Cook County Building Trades Council

| | | | **GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA!**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Power back in the people’s hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651871%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6471gil4bRkmAIHlsP0Ixw&sysid=1)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans-that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651871%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6471gil4bRkmAIHlsP0Ixw&sysid=1)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651872%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s85LhKxIBFAjzpLa91ZnrQ&sysid=1)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651871%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6471gil4bRkmAIHlsP0Ixw&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651873%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SJfxdcR%2f1ID9SKygrqXUXA&sysid=1)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER →**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651871%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6471gil4bRkmAIHlsP0Ixw&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651874%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OCF95iZrcc26VrLINqZcGw&sysid=1)

---

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651885%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FpsSP5GEj0vfF8PHFKq0BA&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651886%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6RzDMzjluzT9V4EGJ7GFvA&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651887%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fFiP%2f7wZP0gKuD1T2X1nTg&sysid=1)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

|

Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

| | Letter from Eric Underwood
---
| | My fellow Republicans, I have been blessed with forming new relationships across the nation including my RNC colleagues. Dorothy Moon, who is the Idaho GOP Chairwoman, is one of them. I so appreciate her friendship as well as her passion towards our shared Republican values. Moon’s latest newsletter article is appropriately timed for what we are facing in regional and municipal non-partisan elections. Take out all references to Idaho and Boise, and this describes the political landscape here in Lincoln and Omaha. We are very fortunate to have a nonpartisan ballot elected mayor in Omaha who is a Republican, but this issue also involves numerous local and state legislative races across Nebraska. There is a reason for this nonpartisan designation; namely to conceal a candidate’s adherence to non-Republican values. Chairwoman Moon is driving the Idaho GOP forward by honoring their constitution, defending their platform values, and respecting the core of the party. The core of the party is the 80% who believe in values before personality. We may not agree on every perfect minutia of our values, but our morality and ethics unite us because we are like-minded in our resolve. The core of the party is EVERYONE being welcomed who believes in truth and transparency. The core of the party is YOU! This week's prayer:As we seek His Truth and know that God's Will shall be done, remember we are tasked with putting on every piece of God's armor. (Ephesians 6: 13-17) The armor of God protecting the CORE of our body is the Body Armor of God's Righteousness and this is framed by the Belt of Truth. I pray that we know our true enemy, and know in our hearts that this spiritual war can only be won when we seek God. I pray for healing and building of relationships in our party knowing that our values can and will unify us over time. Honor the ConstitutionDefend the PlatformRespect the CoreEric Underwood,NEGOP Chair
---
| | The Left uses Nonpartisan Municipal Elections to Push Dangerous PolicyBy Dorothy Moon, IDGOP Chairwoman The most radically liberal politicians in America run for office under the protection of nonpartisanship. Once in office, these same “unaligned” officials raise money for the Democrat Party and push extreme policies that harm small businesses and working people. Decades ago, Progressives pushed for “nonpartisan” municipal elections. Their theory was simple: municipal government exists to provide services; political affiliation is immaterial to one’s ability to administer and provide services.Of course, the days of city leaders just paving potholes or opening parks are long gone. Look around America’s cities and it’s clear things have changed: “nonpartisan” mayors of Los Angeles have pushed for the seizure of private property to house vagrants; “nonpartisan” mayors of Seattle advocated for and administer a taxpayer-funded needle exchange; “nonpartisan” mayors of Portland have called for the legalization of all drugs; and “nonpartisan” mayors of Chicago and San Antonio have authored resolutions censuring Republican presidents and Republican members of Congress. “Nonpartisan” leaders turn out to be ideologues pushing dangerous policy ideas and a radical agenda bent on making American urban life unlivable for anyone but the super rich and the homeless. Idaho is not immune. The most radical Leftist leaders in our state all hold office under a cloak of “nonpartisanship.” When Joe Biden visited Idaho, Boise Mayor Lauren McLean was there waiting on the tarmac to greet him. McLean, a close political ally of Biden Cabinet official Pete Buttigieg, authored a “manifesto” advocating for the mass resettlement of refugees in Idaho and a city hiring and firing policy based on skin color and ethnic identity. Mayor McLean, a dyed-in-the-wool socialist Democrat, ran for office as a “nonpartisan” candidate.McLean has pushed radical Leftist ideas like allowing Boise to nullify Idaho laws on abortion, gun rights, and education. “Nonpartisan” municipal leaders around Idaho flagrantly ignore the will of Idaho’s people, using their “no labels” to appear objective and moderate. The era of nonpartisan municipal elections needs to come to an end. The Idaho Republican Party approved a resolution calling upon the Idaho State Legislature to stop sanctioning the fiction that candidates for local office are somehow free of partisan ideas or ideological preferences: Candidates for local office should run with a listed political affiliation. Requiring candidates to run with their party affiliation serves the common good, both because the public has a right to know what party a candidate aligns with and because greater transparency is a cure for hyper-partisanship and radical ideological prejudices. Several recent academic studies have shown that non-partisanship tends to produce elected officials more representative of the upper socioeconomic classes than of the general populace and it aggravates the class bias in voting turnout. Idaho doesn’t need nonpartisan experts to rule us; we want working-class men and women to run for office and govern wisely. Partisan municipal elections will produce real benefits for the men and women who make Idaho a good place to call home.###

---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: As the nature of the 2024 races start to clear up a bit, one thing has become even more crystal clear: We must elect Ruben Gallego to the U.S. Senate seat in Arizona.
body:
Kyrsten Sinema and Kari Lake aren’t fit for the Senate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T847ac70a-9921-444c-bd9f-a0d17ae6ad83/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **As the nature of the 2024 races start to clear up a bit, one thing has become even more crystal clear: We must elect Ruben Gallego to the U.S. Senate seat in Arizona.** _We do not yet know if turncoat Kyrsten Sinema is going to run, but we have to raise resources in the expectation she will. And on the other side is democracy-attacking fascist, Kari Lake, who has expressed interest in this race even though she has yet to admit she lost the last one._ [**Can you please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to this "Marine, Latino...with a record of standing up for working people." He's what we always wish our Senators would be.** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T23c83c14-0198-4822-9207-30d112c9c778/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _I can tell you why Ruben Gallego is great, as I've done before_ , but I'll let him tell you about himself. This is from a recent email of his: _Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.

I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor. So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.

I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch. I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race...doesn’t matter.

The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1eac72f3-c82d-495e-94d8-fed5450de423/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_We have an exceptional candidate who's progressive as hell in a swing state, Arizona, turning blue. If Gallego does great in 2024, so will President Biden. The President must win this state, one of his closest contests in '20, and Gallego must win if we're to hold our Senate majority._** [**So can you please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to this "Marine, Latino...with a record of standing up for working people." He's what we always wish our Senators would be.** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T649b4740-f7ac-4387-9b73-adf49418499d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thanks for fighting for a great candidate and a great person,** Cliff
---
| | |
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f047a37-e1a5-4288-9c1c-6a8b29565819/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: Kyrsten Sinema and Kari Lake aren’t fit for the Senate | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, As the nature of the 2024 races start to clear up a bit, one thing has become even more crystal clear: We must elect Ruben Gallego to the U.S. Senate seat in Arizona. We do not yet know if turncoat Kyrsten Sinema is going to run, but we have to raise resources in the expectation she will. And on the other side is democracy-attacking fascist, Kari Lake, who has expressed interest in this race even though she has yet to admit she lost the last one. I can tell you why Ruben Gallego is great, as I've done before , but I'll let him tell you about himself. This is from a recent email of his: Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me. I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor. So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate. I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch. I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race...doesn’t matter. The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right. | | | | | | | | We have an exceptional candidate who's progressive as hell in a swing state, Arizona, turning blue. If Gallego does great in 2024, so will President Biden. The President must win this state, one of his closest contests in '20, and Gallego must win if we're to hold our Senate majority. name: Heather (VPP)
subject: I noticed that you haven’t finished your donation yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
I wanted to reach out and let you know:
| Hi friend!

My name is Heather and I help run Voter Protection Project! We noticed you were about to send a donation, but didn’t complete the process.

I just wanted to reach out and let you know that we rely ENTIRELY on grassroots donors like you to fund our programs supporting strong Democratic candidates who will help us take back our majority in the U.S. House.

We don’t deal with big dollar donors, shady billionaires, or backroom deals. Just folks like you, chipping in a few bucks at a time. [We’re relying on you, friend: Will you complete the donation you’d previously started? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41402?t=6&akid=6620%2E878179%2EQAmBKp) | [CLICK HERE TO FINISH YOUR DONATION »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41402?t=7&akid=6620%2E878179%2EQAmBKp)
---
Thank you SO MUCH, friend!

Heather
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6620%2E878179%2EQAmBKp). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6620%2E878179%2EQAmBKp).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6620%2E878179%2EQAmBKp) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=6620%2E878179%2EQAmBKp). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6620%2E878179%2EQAmBKp)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=6620%2E878179%2EQAmBKp)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I always take these two things with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, whenever I meet with voters, the first thing I do is grab a pen, take out my notebook and open to a fresh page.
Everything that voters share with me ends up in that notebook — their stories, their solutions to the problems facing our communities and their ideas for making our government work better.
When I head back to Washington and get to work in the Senate, I don't forget the stories and solutions I've heard on the road. Instead, I open up my notebook and get to work. These notes help me draft legislation to tackle the issues that matter most. And they ensure that the solutions I put forward will actually work for the families who need them.
**Over the years, I've filled countless notebooks with these stories. And now, as 2023 gets into full swing, I've already made a dent in my newest notebook. But before I finalize my legislative priorities for the coming year, I need to hear from as many people as possible. **
**[You're one of my most reliable supporters, so I'm really hoping to have your input here: Please, will you take a moment to respond to my March Priorities Focus Group before it closes at midnight tonight? Here is your personal link:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59552029/394496309/-737210836?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3955-su-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzRhZjM0NS00NmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t0f5JfZ3RoWsw9CffqcRYVbRujqRFowAPOIeE-sI8xk=&emci=59681f27-3bb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bc4af345-46b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7659029) ****[http://surveys.signforgood.com/KEG](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59552030/394496310/-737210836?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3955-su-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzRhZjM0NS00NmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t0f5JfZ3RoWsw9CffqcRYVbRujqRFowAPOIeE-sI8xk=&emci=59681f27-3bb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bc4af345-46b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7659029)** | | [Join the Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59552031/394496311/-737210836?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3955-su-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzRhZjM0NS00NmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t0f5JfZ3RoWsw9CffqcRYVbRujqRFowAPOIeE-sI8xk=&emci=59681f27-3bb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bc4af345-46b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7659029)
---
Families know better than any Washington lobbyist about the issues facing our country — and more often than not they have a good idea of how to fix things. My job is to listen to voters, hear their solutions and make them happen. These notes help me do that job better.
Stories in my notebook inspired legislation to stop gun trafficking, reform how our military handles sexual assault cases, expand benefits for veterans and so much more. **As a public servant, there's no higher honor than being entrusted with a voter's story — and there's no greater victory than winning the change that voter needed.**
As we head into a new year, there already are so many issues filling the pages of my new notebook — ensuring affordable day care, winning family leave, supporting our seniors, making health care affordable and more. **[But I want to make sure that I hear from you too, friend. So please, will you take a moment to join my live focus group now? Here's your personal link again:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59552034/394496312/-737210836?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3955-su-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzRhZjM0NS00NmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t0f5JfZ3RoWsw9CffqcRYVbRujqRFowAPOIeE-sI8xk=&emci=59681f27-3bb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bc4af345-46b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7659029) ****[http://surveys.signforgood.com/KEG](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59552036/394496315/-737210836?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3955-su-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzRhZjM0NS00NmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t0f5JfZ3RoWsw9CffqcRYVbRujqRFowAPOIeE-sI8xk=&emci=59681f27-3bb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bc4af345-46b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7659029)**
Thank you for taking a moment to share what issues are on your mind. I'm eager to read your responses and get to work on the issues that matter to you.

With gratitude and love,

Kirsten
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59552039/394496322/1575385346?code=jtk3955-su-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzRhZjM0NS00NmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t0f5JfZ3RoWsw9CffqcRYVbRujqRFowAPOIeE-sI8xk=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. clean_body: | | | Friend, whenever I meet with voters, the first thing I do is grab a pen, take out my notebook and open to a fresh page. Everything that voters share with me ends up in that notebook — their stories, their solutions to the problems facing our communities and their ideas for making our government work better. When I head back to Washington and get to work in the Senate, I don't forget the stories and solutions I've heard on the road. Instead, I open up my notebook and get to work. These notes help me draft legislation to tackle the issues that matter most. And they ensure that the solutions I put forward will actually work for the families who need them. Over the years, I've filled countless notebooks with these stories. And now, as 2023 gets into full swing, I've already made a dent in my newest notebook. But before I finalize my legislative priorities for the coming year, I need to hear from as many people as possible. | | Families know better than any Washington lobbyist about the issues facing our country — and more often than not they have a good idea of how to fix things. My job is to listen to voters, hear their solutions and make them happen. These notes help me do that job better. Stories in my notebook inspired legislation to stop gun trafficking, reform how our military handles sexual assault cases, expand benefits for veterans and so much more. As a public servant, there's no higher honor than being entrusted with a voter's story — and there's no greater victory than winning the change that voter needed. As we head into a new year, there already are so many issues filling the pages of my new notebook — ensuring affordable day care, winning family leave, supporting our seniors, making health care affordable and more. Thank you for taking a moment to share what issues are on your mind. I'm eager to read your responses and get to work on the issues that matter to you. With gratitude and love, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Newsweek: Congress Can Help Reduce Surprise Medical Bills | Opinion
body:
| | | |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=5bbd4cac4824439e98b6fc6516097ed7&_e=Du0U4J6ZAhoBcD0tAy_jZMXLcwzG3_6OzOjdRuF6r8T15iT0rfVSEHvUwVqfGptgFVq9HeBCVaMsh3AgIWO5tuRenEqcRD21eiC3o1jhH0NBAr6lh_vzltWazaRavCdycehOW8OKaVPs34ZKrE0IihV7EglqK6uOQbnn3Zjv_kJYl83Qr0fbLpRRT0O-2b75fKVq8d59er24H4wLh9RZKA%3D%3D)
---
_**Congress Can Help Reduce Surprise Medical Bills | Opinion**_ By Bobby Jindal and Neil Gheewala
---
The Biden administration and Congress have made multiple efforts to crack down on "Surprise Medical Bills" to protect patients from exorbitant out-of-network bills during emergency services. These efforts are a positive step, but are incomplete. Patients are still frequently surprised and frustrated by outpatient fees that differ markedly between standalone facilities and hospital-owned outpatient departments. Congress must equalize site-of-service payments to protect patients from arbitrarily higher costs and to help put Medicare on a more sustainable funding path. Outpatient care consists of office visits, testing, and procedures that do not involve an overnight hospital stay. These encounters can occur at hospital outpatient facilities or at physician-owned facilities, like doctors' offices or Ambulatory Surgery Centers (ASCs). When doctors order diagnostic tests or procedures, they usually think they are acting in the best interests of their patients by sending them to an affiliated facility. However, many doctors, like their patients, are unaware that site-of-service for outpatient procedures has a dramatic effect on the costs patients pay. Enforcing existing price transparency laws would give consumers more control over their personal health care expenditures, create more free market choices, and encourage patients to receive their outpatient care in more efficient and affordable settings. ASCs have been a major disrupter to the status quo. Competing with hospital outpatient surgical departments, ASCs have increased the scope of procedures that can be safely done with better efficiency, cost accounting, and a lower cost of care. State lawmakers should increase competition and lower costs by repealing ASC "Certificate of Need" laws and state restrictions that prevent them from performing all procedures approved by the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS). [**FINISH READING ON NEWSWEEK.COM**](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=5bbd4cac4824439e98b6fc6516097ed7&_e=Du0U4J6ZAhoBcD0tAy_jZLyqiUM2xQfqesCtgnoMap1wmnn2oA27gcSV0qQcGnP1gJENkakYXMAsVvEzp3lfLpr4FK2Y4-15tyrX-hw-kVme-bwpd-p_BQWr2ljh1nZaQvxqKTBbAkr-oBTO2V__oCAg_bhSiDkYwwkWhMaoIMCfGIklhAmeBgjDDAn6kiyL6gO-J9ImIa_xrr6Jt2CsxQDyoLw-dMrsLAPRM9D-ZrfUuiTb4K5rDh6e2fM5oFh5ZdUMatHLeXDEX_owleqlfX1vafVDp8OmK6h4psCyBx0%3D)

name: Your America
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09592%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Db03avVIJiONfXwtWsg8eA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09593%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gYgNaYZLTmgWR5wswn%2fyaQ&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09594%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b20m05YmxZFZkRsj7R2ViQ&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

We cannot let up at this crucial moment because so much is at stake.

Let’s fight to protect our planet,

I want to take a moment to thank you for your crucial early support. Early investments in races like ours are critical to winning tough elections and keeping this seat.

Let me be clear about the stakes that we’re already seeing: The GOP is zeroing in on this race already and they know that the road to keeping the majority, or Democrats retaking it, runs through our district.

While the race is still months away, I’m working hard in the House to deliver for Ohioans – as I’ve done my entire career. I won’t let the GOP attacks intimidate me from doing what the people of Ohio deserve in a Representative.

Thank you for your continued support,

Marcy Kaptur

Because of what we raised in February (the direct result of grassroots supporters like you), we'll be able to invest in critical community outreach that can help us promote Jennifer's record all across VA-10.

Peter,

Democrats are currently at a crossroads, and the leaders we elect in 2024 and beyond will define the future of our party for generations to come.

At Democrats Serve, we’re leading the conversation about how the political landscape is changing for Democrats and what kinds of candidates we should be supporting as we shape the future of the party.

**That’s why I’m thrilled to announce that we are launching the Democrats Serve Podcast!** Every week, I will join Former Florida State Representative Robert Asencio to interview elected officials, strategists, campaign staffers, and candidates to tackle the biggest challenges Democrats are facing in 2024 and beyond.

**Our first guest is Nikki Fried,** a former public defender, state agriculture commissioner, and the newly elected Chair of the Florida Democratic Party. She joined us to discuss a wide variety of issues around the Sunshine State's future.

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

Democrats Serve
55 Beach Shore Drive
Milford, CT 06460
United States

Friend, Big Tech corporations like Google wield an __enormous__ amount of power and influence over the internet and our daily lives. Google single-handedly controls what consumers see – and, more significantly – what they do _not_ see. They also control what advertisers can say, and at what price. **Virginians deserve a free market for products, services, and ideas, not a censored, curated monopoly from a corporation like Google. ** Friend, what Google is doing is a _blatant violation_ of antitrust laws, which is why I joined other attorneys general across the country who are suing the Big Tech giant. _[**_Chip in now to join my fight to protect Virginians’ free speech from corporations like Google._**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=02661fcba0004bd8b4ac409dcf803ca0&_e=puo3M1N8GsoqMCdvwGaVbNybZZbecZbIL7Q-HCFHhKQaGtx9xDPYmqkVILMekeVjQd8yPNPY2JC1L6RN9KWqzYBnI0zv2mE3ejVUdBp11RLvVjpWcAcyawjz4N9ZUnK_sOfAAx3s3kbpV69Hsq_qQmYobub1i2Qb3kuQX7H5sd5EFWWItqI_IRfn5AEB563kV4ie7L6xUm-OB8RrRTzhpop0tAtN4tMCUVvxSh46B2XMVQvQ7L45EdmvUrJej5_olkxI44YqFWli5aHI_3psGd7xE3yq0GPDRC2JXEEtjkDnIVyA6RfjcD25YYdwKMSgnS-qUpKzwR2w4h7LFqPt090tXvd8nR--hTgxJh9UY24oYZeF9wCECZplviEoF_wE)_

clean_body: Virginians deserve a free market for products, services, and ideas, not... | | | Friend, Big Tech corporations like Google wield an enormous amount of power and influence over the internet and our daily lives. Google single-handedly controls what consumers see – and, more significantly – what they do not see. They also control what advertisers can say, and at what price. Virginians deserve a free market for products, services, and ideas, not a censored, curated monopoly from a corporation like Google. Friend, what Google is doing is a blatant violation of antitrust laws, which is why I joined other attorneys general across the country who are suing the Big Tech giant. | | | | | | | Thank you for your help,Jason Miyares | | | | | | A Personal Note from Jason: 50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. subject: They’re setting the stage for a showdown

body:

| | Peter —

Republicans have been making plans to strike down Social Security. They can attempt to deny it, but the evidence speaks for itself. Over 150 Republicans in Congress have already signed on to a plan that would privatize this crucial program.

**_[Millions of American seniors are counting on us to take action to stop this. People who work hard all their lives and pay into Social Security deserve to be able to use the money to retire with dignity. With so many seniors sinking into poverty, especially women and people of color, Democrats are putting in the work to expand Social Security benefits.

But Republicans are not going to let up on this, setting the stage for a showdown. That is why we need to make it clear that we will continue to stand up for Social Security and protect it from these cruel attempts by the GOP to damage it.

name: Working Families Party
subject: The Social Security Expansion Act of 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, At a time when nearly half of older Americans have no retirement savings and almost fifty percent of our nation’s seniors are trying to survive on an income of less than $25,000 a year — **we need to strengthen and expand Social Security, not cut it.** For generations, Social Security has safeguarded tens of millions of people from destitution. Not just people over the age of 65, but also millions of people — young _and_ old — with disabilities, and children who have lost, or don’t have a working parent. It’s our nation’s most powerful anti-poverty program, and yet every year, Republicans threaten to strike it down in order to — _you guessed it_ — bankroll tax cuts for the rich. **Recently though, Senator Bernie Sanders introduced legislation to expand benefits by $2,400 a year and fully fund the program through 2095 by getting the wealthy to pay their fair share.** [**Add your name as a grassroots co-sponsor of the Social Security Expansion Act of 2023 to ensure every senior in the U.S. can retire with the dignity that they deserve, and every person with a disability, or child without a working parent can live with the security they need.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlBNhiUhIkbX_VXVxXAv8Qeag_aSZstKyjLb6VBGuVF3SMDHkaThH8POfdheLdek6hl-zWEzdByex4ORhZVhzteEA53M2cPJiENHNyNdsBFkk0u1FIXllQGHNqdFblvzWYuWPG3JoxrK0wUBS_KEoMb4-9oUYXMJgvdR-fUpewuNXrCdhjEka7swm8lV5SvGiixiT8RTB0XKppFdUlSuFmg05iIJ0GZm2MiMFpzPEiwgAKld73oSEGllBHxBbgAY9Q_q6fWxQuWADz4WlDJkXBOGAqEUB_URLMKnNj7puBjjZ_pGbwQXPwgOjbWyqwFY0t4SIeKp3PRuzDykghMO1AlfYjnHBPIwuTxbJk3hYuwJXoRXMNiJbJq7odneLZG5LdA5m0sFI3JyVtsVwdtcpxInbzVeS42R267-GaymyAVM4AwZnDxZOv22f4jAhaY0jfFmU90U55Yq1N6mranCbI96u-bVKPmPwXpxc1QuO6hde7vonscckOOHAQtHtU8LBi59VyDKcbMCcIpc1oT2DChcHLMQ7bMnd-F9H8d9cniTw/3u5/AinNqKJUR_mzKLv2uvBW4Q/h0/LizEcRGi7ataSOt4Wwqnap983a1pYic6br1j29ISTyQ) Right now, because of an income cap set in 1983 on Social Security contributions, even CEOs and billionaires only pay taxes on their first $160,000 of income. Meanwhile, teachers, nurses, and other workers who make less than that are paying taxes on _100%_ of their income. **How is it in any way fair that somebody making millions or even billions of dollars a year is contributing the _exact same amount_ into Social Security as somebody making $160,000 a year?** Let's scrap the cap and require millionaires and billionaires pay their fair share into Social Security. [**Add your name now to become a grassroots co-sponsor of the Social Security Expansion Act of 2023 and stand alongside Senator Bernie Sanders, Senator Elizabeth Warren, and other Democratic lawmakers demanding our most successful anti-poverty program is expanded and protected for generations to clean_body: | | | Peter, At a time when nearly half of older Americans have no retirement savings and almost fifty percent of our nation’s seniors are trying to survive on an income of less than $25,000 a year — we need to strengthen and expand Social Security, not cut it. For generations, Social Security has safeguarded tens of millions of people from destitution. Not just people over the age of 65, but also millions of people — young and old — with disabilities, and children who have lost, or don’t have a working parent. It’s our nation’s most powerful anti-poverty program, and yet every year, Republicans threaten to strike it down in order to — you guessed it — bankroll tax cuts for the rich. Recently though, Senator Bernie Sanders introduced legislation to expand benefits by $2,400 a year and fully fund the program through 2095 by getting the wealthy to pay their fair share. Right now, because of an income cap set in 1983 on Social Security contributions, even CEOs and billionaires only pay taxes on their first $160,000 of income. Meanwhile, teachers, nurses, and other workers who make less than that are paying taxes on 100% of their income. How is it in any way fair that somebody making millions or even billions of dollars a year is contributing the exact same amount into Social Security as somebody making $160,000 a year? Let's scrap the cap and require millionaires and billionaires pay their fair share into Social Security. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c469f96286ee47c1a7b0e41ef5268173&_e=O0F9-4oTjLOyRNiiE5DeZTFzzdf0jD-MUFq3wbnRS3q2FEHjZ-kNdkWQGAR9mqy5po43k3tInyCJa2GJGOxpub1JOFD-1wkjOTk3g2qGIT1fBLyFrX4s6Qmvtmht52NnoBFhzx4Ol12uMdKbI5Tgpja1hhLRK7XE0kPSF3MBSIpcXBJTn_VWYp7oZDaYkZCpdpxE5F1doTaHZjzx2z9_6skdQKTVX_8k2Erq5lWnd6lpQc9ivh_5iF1aru9zF_knx3i2do1aXq3YDqu3DTZhI8G-U1ojQJEaAahg7coV6qjjfkZmq6rrjRYbMml-EdicyK2FeIwEluGMWfEqwvfWBye6rN-khvSDRwxurTnF-quMub77tzbj4fhkH1STe_dBlzP0gaYG8QrK-h-pvAOiJK1YKKzagZv_Q5QomtC2JJGVpdNxDj5Az2Q2x4ymZHr9 "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c469f96286ee47c1a7b0e41ef5268173&_e=O0F9-4oTjLOyRNiiE5DeZTFzzdf0jD-MUFq3wbnRS3q2FEHjZ-kNdkWQGAR9mqy5po43k3tInyCJa2GJGOxpub1JOFD-1wkjOTk3g2qGIT1fBLyFrX4s6Qmvtmht52NnoBFhzx4Ol12uMdKbI5Tgpja1hhLRK7XE0kPSF3MBSIpcXBJTn_VWYp7oZDaYkZCpdpxE5F1doTaHZjzx2z9_6skdQKTVX_8k2Erq5lWnd6lpQc9ivh_5iF1aru9zF_knx3i2do1aXq3YDqu3DTZhI8G-U1ojQJEaAahg7coV6qg_aTKL_c_KpyHkPRFykbNy9y5fijj11UI7x8WmmpRgplBV8Psbinz_ZYOV1gcks8SxLXHvsm0wDZhxUIQR2pCXyO1Vvg9BADHSyIuI9iIAdA_58ONZeGvPYgmzIieLlGDuWTc0nnmXjSGcdOKco8Rn "Renew your membership before it’s too late >>>")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c469f96286ee47c1a7b0e41ef5268173&_e=O0F9-4oTjLOyRNiiE5DeZTFzzdf0jD-MUFq3wbnRS3q2FEHjZ-kNdkWQGAR9mqy5po43k3tInyCJa2GJGOxpub1JOFD-1wkjOTk3g2qGIT1fBLyFrX4s6Qmvtmht52NnoBFhzx4Ol12uMdKbI5Tgpja1hhLRK7XE0kPSF3MBSIpcXBJTn_VWYp7oZDaYkZCpdpxE5F1doTaHZjzx2z9_6skdQKTVX_8k2Erq5lWnd6lpQc9ivh_5iF1aru9zF_knx3i2do1aXq3YDqu3DTZhI8G-U1ojQJEaAahg7coV6qj7mMY0W5YaodGaKTTtcvm1D2slzTnjjSsal5DAvyD1hX5RNmtEP9UJJTn6ZTpmK4n4JP1wQwtWAKMyulSKtC-_VLt6xgz9Huq8OMB4MGUnFjzJxwofK_ufy4uHQV5lVxAah85aErdkFflaldw1JrWq "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c469f96286ee47c1a7b0e41ef5268173&_e=O0F9-4oTjLOyRNiiE5DeZTFzzdf0jD-MUFq3wbnRS3q2FEHjZ-kNdkWQGAR9mqy5po43k3tInyCJa2GJGOxpub1JOFD-1wkjOTk3g2qGIT1fBLyFrX4s6Qmvtmht52NnoBFhzx4Ol12uMdKbI5Tgpja1hhLRK7XE0kPSF3MBSIpcXBJTn_VWYp7oZDaYkZCpdpxE5F1doTaHZjzx2z9_6skdQKTVX_8k2Erq5lWnd6lpQc9ivh_5iF1aru9zF_knx3i2do1aXq3YDqu3DTZhI8G-U1ojQJEaAahg7coV6qhsmMz_YwmGrB0tdk7VZeaVGSOimArkqDyWmvA9ipKq_8og12Uv51FoCjYUDXn3E470kyfcRNzIfyZ7O8HYpEcPF9kvzTDgF1MmUcA0ksybP--5X3YWN6v_tom7EnikLgL_ceUlP2ASoc3G7speHZO7 "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c469f96286ee47c1a7b0e41ef5268173&_e=O0F9-4oTjLOyRNiiE5DeZTFzzdf0jD-MUFq3wbnRS3q2FEHjZ-kNdkWQGAR9mqy5po43k3tInyCJa2GJGOxpub1JOFD-1wkjOTk3g2qGIT1fBLyFrX4s6Qmvtmht52NnoBFhzx4Ol12uMdKbI5Tgpja1hhLRK7XE0kPSF3MBSIpcXBJTn_VWYp7oZDaYkZCpdpxE5F1doTaHZjzx2z9_6skdQKTVX_8k2Erq5lWnd6lpQc9ivh_5iF1aru9zF_knx3i2do1aXq3YDqu3DTZhI8G-U1ojQJEaAahg7coV6qgPFTd1G2yorum5Ny02fdmXtsAzxvdgsmuuubPOdY1a0p3F0ZxxPeQpvPN4tP4NyMdVjB88d5K7jmd1pSWRYrDJ_3lkDzAlRD1Rhr82N0-WT61BmK3RDXW0dxWWhcVvAKaeuOAVgKK_663D_PaiF6Uj "Renew before it’s too late >>>")_**

name: Sen. Jon Tester (via Democrats.org)
subject: Did you hear? I’m running.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I wanted to make sure you saw my exciting announcement: I’m officially running for reelection. This race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t done yet. | |
---
Hey Derek, it’s Senator Jon Tester from the great state of Montana -- I wanted to make sure you saw my exciting announcement: **I’m officially running for reelection.** This race won’t be easy, so I’m counting on support from folks like you to fight back: **If I’m going to win this thing, I’ll need you by my side from the start. Please consider splitting a donation of $10 between the Democratic National Committee and my campaign right now to become a Founding Donor.**

** ** **** ** I’m not your typical politician. In fact, I’m the only working dirt farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured working people have someone defending them in the United States Senate. **And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected.** I’m one of the most vulnerable Senators running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. **I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 -- and I’ll do it again.** **[I can’t do it without your support, Derek. Can I count on you to split a donation of $10 between the DNC and my reelection campaign? clean_body: I wanted to make sure you saw my exciting announcement: I’m officially running for reelection. This race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t done yet. | | Hey Derek, it’s Senator Jon Tester from the great state of Montana -- I wanted to make sure you saw my exciting announcement: I’m officially running for reelection. This race won’t be easy, so I’m counting on support from folks like you to fight back: If I’m going to win this thing, I’ll need you by my side from the start. Please consider splitting a donation of $10 between the Democratic National Committee and my campaign right now to become a Founding Donor. I’m not your typical politician. In fact, I’m the only working dirt farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured working people have someone defending them in the United States Senate. And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected. I’m one of the most vulnerable Senators running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 -- and I’ll do it again. It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all. Thanks, Jon Jon Tester U.S. Senator, Montana The DNC's Congressional Split Series helps fundraise for and raise awareness around down-ballot Democrats in some of the most important races across the country. When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit folks on the ballot next cycle -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come.
