I'm looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=78520f5a34c64413b2ae8c627f930a27&_e=l71t2LOYRlkoxowvlDL0T1WpMrpseOuBV1-9S18A-6DTRNlmtCEmSnWFovFyq2i12s7UwRXDbva8mIv-Fjdx8CWycg2sQY8icg2uqWdRvuB08l2ahmH4IO8ZCEknKlw67F0hT7Z_PtICeXtf-Grpy8n49I17r8rs2odPtEwpTCKK5UH6644Neg5zQZxJZyY3VCvhIfObmepMyvDQJB27zylAdU243v8YXP3GdXvTkynKh_B-QCwlBdaYKYvlxWAA5psylc-tC7W47MSyq4QZMyHvDAGU_kofFawMa6Brnei0mak-BoHJMpq1uabeR6a3TCy2uIhyvUDHHXOSGX9J0OBFyoc2p2ERYiu1r42Q_sZrFKcgWGQP-0nIKiaKKtYRB8xi8tLf-N7OVZ-dAegt2-NuRmA7U1kwbq3R2BSFzMszT7gcFwKTyNHckdCQ_9x_)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans-that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=78520f5a34c64413b2ae8c627f930a27&_e=l71t2LOYRlkoxowvlDL0T1WpMrpseOuBV1-9S18A-6DTRNlmtCEmSnWFovFyq2i12s7UwRXDbva8mIv-Fjdx8CWycg2sQY8icg2uqWdRvuB08l2ahmH4IO8ZCEknKlw67F0hT7Z_PtICeXtf-Grpy8n49I17r8rs2odPtEwpTCKK5UH6644Neg5zQZxJZyY3VCvhIfObmepMyvDQJB27zylAdU243v8YXP3GdXvTkynKh_B-QCwlBdaYKYvlxWAA5psylc-tC7W47MSyq4QZMwQmOol1uJizL1l-HrDy1JPNtNQ-vdrwk3T1UCfxbsSY_7lEf1juRupxRIGITP7gfNwfGpS6-swK1wH6VNmyIrhysX0Y9ZVaN-VbTSUGf4PXSmxyq4i6S5UW0zVTSWGUtZtnG8GwuVjbz_zN5sQdK1ErOMrOvWN-EauFsSX8SVWt)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=78520f5a34c64413b2ae8c627f930a27&_e=l71t2LOYRlkoxowvlDL0T1WpMrpseOuBV1-9S18A-6DTRNlmtCEmSnWFovFyq2i12s7UwRXDbva8mIv-Fjdx8CWycg2sQY8icg2uqWdRvuB08l2ahmH4IO8ZCEknKlw67F0hT7Z_PtICeXtf-Grpy8n49I17r8rs2odPtEwpTCKK5UH6644Neg5zQZxJZyY3VCvhIfObmepMyvDQJB27zylAdU243v8YXP3GdXvTkynKh_B-QCwlBdaYKYvlxWAA5psylc-tC7W47MSyq4QZM--sIa9l-7cgvEf-eBvxRzE4SN4DsbWsXzutd3XKUdpZFADjT78chnxstqXMcNeDTp1tcPXnbJ15Gr-ocwtXltakhbodMmST26wwVnE6dOndqDnx5hW8VppGztBcHAQFqiFhMY1Fw6hPkVEorxC0HzEfaJvPddxwROZAWBr2WdUZ)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=78520f5a34c64413b2ae8c627f930a27&_e=l71t2LOYRlkoxowvlDL0T1WpMrpseOuBV1-9S18A-6DTRNlmtCEmSnWFovFyq2i12s7UwRXDbva8mIv-Fjdx8CWycg2sQY8icg2uqWdRvuB08l2ahmH4IO8ZCEknKlw67F0hT7Z_PtICeXtf-Grpy8n49I17r8rs2odPtEwpTCKK5UH6644Neg5zQZxJZyY3VCvhIfObmepMyvDQJB27zylAdU243v8YXP3GdXvTkynKh_B-QCwlBdaYKYvlxWAA5psylc-tC7W47MSyq4QZM4sMyyoGVA-BjCR0tDyHNud4Cc0nqyzrkht3N4ld6FIkD60w0EweEnj-0dj23sZKTGv_eqsbBRNZ7oVniVLX_LljlQ-lB0mnwB8sB8lxC7s1MZvFbpOwF4eVjzan6aOHcKI7ZupHRlluKGl_s1pbSRlfBVyoUgU6ojYyVN3BI8z1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=78520f5a34c64413b2ae8c627f930a27&_e=l71t2LOYRlkoxowvlDL0T1WpMrpseOuBV1-9S18A-6DTRNlmtCEmSnWFovFyq2i12s7UwRXDbva8mIv-Fjdx8CWycg2sQY8icg2uqWdRvuB08l2ahmH4IO8ZCEknKlw67F0hT7Z_PtICeXtf-Grpy8n49I17r8rs2odPtEwpTCKK5UH6644Neg5zQZxJZyY3VCvhIfObmepMyvDQJB27zylAdU243v8YXP3GdXvTkynKh_B-QCwlBdaYKYvlxWAA5psylc-tC7W47MSyq4QZMyfXBK_3UON7fJR6wIwwsDNxBwWbLPUnuktmzdR-aBF15LNqe7zCMWlkDYaYNvGxsGN789DxjyTQ9tpmavIoWTGZhop58ckBWE6tFlvwYxSDuWY_-mCcpcbjVGmVve-acC8rexg2aEHuSQQaeXPtZJ1MSW-91Iupup4vudZr-_kX)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER ->**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=78520f5a34c64413b2ae8c627f930a27&_e=l71t2LOYRlkoxowvlDL0T1WpMrpseOuBV1-9S18A-6DTRNlmtCEmSnWFovFyq2i12s7UwRXDbva8mIv-Fjdx8CWycg2sQY8icg2uqWdRvuB08l2ahmH4IO8ZCEknKlw67F0hT7Z_PtICeXtf-Grpy8n49I17r8rs2odPtEwpTCKK5UH6644Neg5zQZxJZyY3VCvhIfObmepMyvDQJB27zylAdU243v8YXP3GdXvTkynKh_B-QCwlBdaYKYvlxWAA5psylc-tC7W47MSyq4QZM8tyALoH7NbZIRgAgpz_VaMJ56qkMgy5VS8loAwbl8DEdNmTQoEdBf-ezPU7YB9vUv_jAodl9STNCsgZ6992xSv7gZJpeTsVnS9zvQiIvcPyyR6c-eEl4FDn5sxhOQcQiIzlWzVJ3Zh2WMUvseo-JaCxwjN-UZdiJKKOWTsvgjEA)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=78520f5a34c64413b2ae8c627f930a27&_e=l71t2LOYRlkoxowvlDL0T1WpMrpseOuBV1-9S18A-6DTRNlmtCEmSnWFovFyq2i12s7UwRXDbva8mIv-Fjdx8CWycg2sQY8icg2uqWdRvuB08l2ahmH4IO8ZCEknKlw67F0hT7Z_PtICeXtf-Grpy8n49I17r8rs2odPtEwpTCKK5UH6644Neg5zQZxJZyY3VCvhIfObmepMyvDQJB27zylAdU243v8YXP3GdXvTkynKh_B-QCwlBdaYKYvlxWAA5psylc-tC7W47MSyq4QZM1v03TGwdAVsBhVDHiOEec5gBS7Ey3hGI8GUZ1211ST_DnuP1QUxGL__YVlVg6riyfDS61jBGGaMEItWPxP7AlJIovKUcNQtk3zIEHCQuRoVUOH5JIThxz9TXZpoqgTfdXg-_6eFt8CygQzinCtjn-Nc6GFJIoqonSXRuXp_pRtF)

---

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=78520f5a34c64413b2ae8c627f930a27&_e=l71t2LOYRlkoxowvlDL0T7EvVgSWVh-u8p9QzwMKeQtGb9s2Jb0J_1ngVeNoTlXymnIg-ZCJt9P7zQQUomQtSa67TV9SIpBtdSP9LPZWUbzv8IRRf6sf6YRcvPSvOX8jQLoUq8tnTs14B8ikcfIe7VE5VyHzvHoqFkLbvDuqFKDif7-rx4wcYJwY5uRZ2plzZqGUApEcXvZu0sMbbzayJMZWBkcPNNBRc9f9DAwRjGo%3D) | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=78520f5a34c64413b2ae8c627f930a27&_e=l71t2LOYRlkoxowvlDL0T_EIwr1tJuYoPNgahcF0w_Za_86K5BNyA2p0QqDSesvjDZX237h4ZK7G-Sgei_LmirxMXsHoCTQI2xAT-g6cX7DHUr2jZTWkS8_y3BvBjRh-OeWHWyZu66_sisklBPYIgOv-dtUnL3k05hsr_3cf4rn5LPt_0UZChB1Y970bv9ws6Ar-n0x4calUAP2YmBIS4g%3D%3D) | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=78520f5a34c64413b2ae8c627f930a27&_e=l71t2LOYRlkoxowvlDL0TxWa6yhds8UaMGPhDbPfoSdXSVhWCl2xLrPZ4U2zmLf0EoOnrxFxVcY2rOw-4cJchIe4oFGfmWQYLiRnlXZY2dXQuhy1MjVhtXwr-JKud9zBXr0wJ0tqtQ3eASNpO9jJAlsgJVYJYjuNbLmlACDn7mSs4xI8Juuy8cMe5ORGDY0naXn5HuS86Ugl7tQULnI0sHDybojGldSdImuB7m-ZTbI%3D)

name: Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Voter Alert: Liberal Republicans Put Smear Hit on Ryan Chamberlin
body:
| | | | [](https://emailer.ryanchamberlin.com/lt.php?s=508929fa82e67ab45e4731e44bde2bb3&i=17A21A2A79)
---
| | | My friends, by now, you probably received a couple of false mailers designed to smear me and our campaign in this final week of the election.

Our RINO opponents are desperate, plain and simple.

I guess we should have seen it coming because not one other candidate signed my clean campaign pledge.

While I am disappointed, I will continue to focus on the issues.

We the People know that I stand with Gov. DeSantis on border security, election security, and on keeping woke ideology out of our classrooms.

That’s why we are endorsed by former Congressman Ted Yoho and Florida Family Action PAC, and have the NRA’s highest new candidate rating.

If you have any questions about any of these mailers or my commitment to our conservative cause, feel free to call me on my cell phone at (352) 427-8282.
Sincerely,

Ryan

P.S. The one way to guarantee that liberals can’t steal this election is by having conservatives turn out in big numbers. Remember to vote early between now and Sunday or on Election Day, Tuesday, March 7th!
---
| | | [](https://emailer.ryanchamberlin.com/lt.php?s=508929fa82e67ab45e4731e44bde2bb3&i=17A21A2A79)
---
Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://emailer.ryanchamberlin.com/proc.php?nl=2&c=17&m=21&s=508929fa82e67ab45e4731e44bde2bb3&act=unsub)

Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative, 12305 SE 55th Avenue Rd, Belleview, FL 34420, United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nick=20Melvoin?=
subject: It’s been a month…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289PO Box 92320, Pasadena, CA 91109Additional information is available at fec
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brysongillette/its-been-a-month?e=1012843e9c)
---
[](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=4d28e59566&e=1012843e9c)
Dear Friend,
It’s been one month since I launched this campaign to bring a new generation of leadership to Washington and I’m overwhelmed, and humbled, by your support. Thank you.
I’ve had the chance to reconnect with former students and teachers who want to help; spoken to voters and community leaders throughout the 30th about how to improve their quality of life; been endorsed by members of Congress who need allies to make real our vision for this country. And, of course, I’ve continued to move the school district forward, cutting the ribbon on a $160 million high school renovation, presenting the trophy to one of my schools that won the regional academic decathlon, and leading an inspiring session of Camp Harmony with over 300 campers!
But sadly in this first month, I’ve also been reminded about why I am running in the first place. We have grieved 24 mass shootings in this country – 10 just this past weekend – marking the worst weekend of the year. We’ve seen an increase in anti-Semitic incidents – including two hate-motivated shootings in LA. And we’ve seen a Republican majority in Congress that is rolling back limits on prescription drug costs and proposing cuts to Social Security and Medicare.
And it’s become even more clear that we need a new generation of common-sense, solutions-oriented leadership in Congress. But I can’t do it without your support.****[**If you haven’t had a chance to donate yet in our first month, I hope you will chip in and join our campaign here.**](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=96697d721f&e=1012843e9c)
Reflecting on this first month, both the good days and the bad, I’m more motivated than ever to amplify my impact on a larger scale. And I’m more grateful than ever for your support in making that possible through your generosity.
Thank you -- and onward,
|

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Friend, It’s been one month since I launched this campaign to bring a new generation of leadership to Washington and I’m overwhelmed, and humbled, by your support. Thank you. I’ve had the chance to reconnect with former students and teachers who want to help; spoken to voters and community leaders throughout the 30th about how to improve their quality of life; been endorsed by members of Congress who need allies to make real our vision for this country. And, of course, I’ve continued to move the school district forward, cutting the ribbon on a $160 million high school renovation, presenting the trophy to one of my schools that won the regional academic decathlon, and leading an inspiring session of Camp Harmony with over 300 campers! But sadly in this first month, I’ve also been reminded about why I am running in the first place. We have grieved 24 mass shootings in this country – 10 just this past weekend – marking the worst weekend of the year. We’ve seen an increase in anti-Semitic incidents – including two hate-motivated shootings in LA. And we’ve seen a Republican majority in Congress that is rolling back limits on prescription drug costs and proposing cuts to Social Security and Medicare. And it’s become even more clear that we need a new generation of common-sense, solutions-oriented leadership in Congress. But I can’t do it without your support.**** Reflecting on this first month, both the good days and the bad, I’m more motivated than ever to amplify my impact on a larger scale. And I’m more grateful than ever for your support in making that possible through your generosity. | | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

This is why 2A Task Force was created, to protect our constitutional rights and to stop the Democrats that are hell-bent on taking away our freedoms. The Second Amendment ensures that we can keep our communities and the ones we love safe from harm, but also protects us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. There are now actual checks and balances, but it's not an excuse to **STOP** building an army of 2A Task Force warriors, who are devoted to ensuring that Senate Democrats fail to disarm American citizens. What do you say, Friend? Join the fight and support 2A Task Force.

body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59539064/394466971/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWE3NDNmZi0yYmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RZoSX9bRjis1lfox5EKkpkchL-uJmy1A_Q86RZzKSV0=&emci=0b50f29c-1bb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=09a743ff-2bb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) | Friend, On behalf of our team at the Fairness Project, I wanted to say **thank you.** Thanks to the generosity of dedicated supporters like you, friend, we were able to reach our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign Emergency Fund goal and finish out the month of February on a strong note. The dollars raised from this fund will be _critical_ to our efforts this year as we litigate and run “No” campaigns to defeat any attempts by extremist officials to suppress the power of voters by making ballot measures harder to pass — _especially in states where protecting abortion could be on the ballot as soon as this year. _ 10 states remain where a ballot measure campaign could restore abortion protections after the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ — **but anti-abortion extremists know this, and are coming after the ballot measure process with more ferocity than ever before.** But you and I both know, friend, that when we stand together, when we raise our voices together, **we win.** So, while February has come to a close, we enter March and Women’s History Month stronger than ever. This year’s theme is “Celebrating the Women Who Tell Our Stories,” and team, we plan to do just that. While we get ready to fight back against extremist officials who want to suppress our collective power, will you help us show the strength of this movement? [**If we’ve run a campaign in your state that helped you, please let us know! And if a campaign in your state would be helpful, let us know what issue area you’re most passionate about seeing on the ballot.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59539065/394466972/-637979805?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWE3NDNmZi0yYmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RZoSX9bRjis1lfox5EKkpkchL-uJmy1A_Q86RZzKSV0=&emci=0b50f29c-1bb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=09a743ff-2bb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) [RAISE YOUR VOICE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59539066/394466973/-637979805?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWE3NDNmZi0yYmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RZoSX9bRjis1lfox5EKkpkchL-uJmy1A_Q86RZzKSV0=&emci=0b50f29c-1bb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=09a743ff-2bb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) We’re stronger when we stand together, friend. [**Will you share your story with us so we can show extremist officials the fierce team we’ve built in the fight to preserve the power of voters?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59539067/394466974/-637979805?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWE3NDNmZi0yYmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RZoSX9bRjis1lfox5EKkpkchL-uJmy1A_Q86RZzKSV0=&emci=0b50f29c-1bb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=09a743ff-2bb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) [LET US KNOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59539068/394466975/-637979805?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWE3NDNmZi0yYmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RZoSX9bRjis1lfox5EKkpkchL-uJmy1A_Q86RZzKSV0=&emci=0b50f29c-1bb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=09a743ff-2bb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) Thank you, friend. clean_body: | | Friend, On behalf of our team at the Fairness Project, I wanted to say thank you. Thanks to the generosity of dedicated supporters like you, friend, we were able to reach our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign Emergency Fund goal and finish out the month of February on a strong note. The dollars raised from this fund will be critical to our efforts this year as we litigate and run “No” campaigns to defeat any attempts by extremist officials to suppress the power of voters by making ballot measures harder to pass — especially in states where protecting abortion could be on the ballot as soon as this year. 10 states remain where a ballot measure campaign could restore abortion protections after the fall of Roe v. Wade — but anti-abortion extremists know this, and are coming after the ballot measure process with more ferocity than ever before. But you and I both know, friend, that when we stand together, when we raise our voices together, we win. So, while February has come to a close, we enter March and Women’s History Month stronger than ever. This year’s theme is “Celebrating the Women Who Tell Our Stories,” and team, we plan to do just that. While we get ready to fight back against extremist officials who want to suppress our collective power, will you help us show the strength of this movement? We’re stronger when we stand together, friend. Thank you, friend. Kelly Hall Executive Director Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Lateefah?=
subject: We need to plan long-term. Here’s how you can help:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [ ](https://lateefahforbart.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df04e65f592daac98a815c1f1&id=63b9acee51&e=4181cc0be9)
Friend, thank you.
Since Lateefah launched this campaign on Tuesday, we've gotten a ton of support from all across California's 12th District.
And, thanks to that support, we're already hard at work to build out the campaign that will send Lateefah Simon to Congress.
**But we have a long road ahead of us, so we need to plan long-term.**
And the truth is, the more money we have in-hand early on, the more ambitious those plans can be, the more we can grow our campaign, and the better chance we have at winning this race.
[**_Your early gift will go a long way, so will you donate to Lateefah for Congress right now?_**](https://lateefahforbart.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df04e65f592daac98a815c1f1&id=bce0a80edc&e=4181cc0be9)
**[Donate»](https://lateefahforbart.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df04e65f592daac98a815c1f1&id=fcc52df966&e=4181cc0be9)**
---
Early investments pay huge dividends down the road. For instance, if we have the resources to recruit a volunteer now, that person could reach thousands — or even tens of thousands — of voters before Election Day.
If we can open a campaign office in a key community early on, we'll have months more time in order to engage with and organize that community.
[**_We could go on, but the bottom line is that early support from folks like you could make _the_ difference in this campaign — so, if you can, please make a gift and help us build our movement as early as possible._**](https://lateefahforbart.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df04e65f592daac98a815c1f1&id=a7233ff657&e=4181cc0be9)

Former House Speaker Paul Ryan To Skip 2024 Republican Convention If Trump Wins Nomination

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651816%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TNRGZEsfewYtzCnEfKYp6w&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651817%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hw4ZF4CL6t48288vgI7BNQ&sysid=1 Elon Musk To Launch Anti-Woke A.I.?

Elon Musk, the entrepreneur and founder of SpaceX, Tesla, and Neuralink, has recently launched an initiative to combat what he sees as one of the most significant threats facing humanity: “woke” artificial intelligence. Musk believes that the direction of the first AI tool to hit the mainstream, ChatGPT, is an example of “training AI to be woke” and is recruiting top researchers to develop an alternative.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651817%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hw4ZF4CL6t48288vgI7BNQ&sysid=1

During a recent episode of his podcast, “The Joe Rogan Experience,” host Joe Rogan and his guest, comedian Ryan Long, discussed the issue of gender identity and the recent cultural focus on it. They used the example of a Canadian shop teacher who identifies as a trans woman and wears large prosthetic breasts while teaching children. Rogan argued that society needs to “leave room for crazy people” in every group, including the transgender community. He warned that if society doesn’t allow for this possibility, it risks becoming a “cult.”

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Tell Congress: Pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act
body:
A minute for voting rights!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9784185c-44f8-45ad-bc82-3bbd6afa46e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Last Senate, Republicans abused the filibuster to block sweeping voting rights legislation that was aimed at fighting back against state laws that limited access to the ballot box. We cannot let Congress forget about this crucial legislation and sweep voting rights under the rug. **The John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act would make it easier for all Americans to vote and reverse efforts by states to limit ballot access.** **[Sign the petition to tell Congress to pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea84586e-8687-4794-b24f-e4365000ccd0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2babfccb-db46-4a89-9185-773aead3f5f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Many states have enacted strict voting laws since the 2020 election attempting to strip away access to the ballot box and make it more difficult for voters to cast a ballot in a way that works for them. Now with Republicans in control of the House and Democrats in control of the Senate, we need to make sure they feel the pressure to pass pro-voting legislation. **[Sign the petition to tell Congress to pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9e3a844-5380-4651-b664-df62611f1ebc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3030a39a-9145-45d2-ac3c-b27ab4d7825b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/votingrightsadvancementact-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6bf59e59-c789-48fb-9c7e-4a019362e771/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=2030adba-1109-4102-9bdb-1e90a12e540d&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=2030adba-1109-4102-9bdb-1e90a12e540d&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Liz Walters, Team ODP
subject: Expressing my deepest gratitude:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I just want to take a moment to say, thank you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59540672/394473158/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2QzOTdiYi0zMmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GMScAcESX9isSeGA8g4Y_gei9bGHRvKiap9D9GzAR0Q=) | Team,

I just want to take a moment to say _**thank you.**_

On Tuesday, we faced an ambitious $10,000 end-of-month fundraising goal for February, and thanks to the generosity of so many of you who stepped up and chipped in, **we were able to reach our goal!**

Look: While it may seem far away, 2024 is just around the corner. Election experts have already named Ohio's Senate race a "toss-up," and Senator Sherrod Brown is likely to face multiple extreme candidates. Meeting every goal we set is crucial to Ohio Democrats’ success in 2024.

Our team counts on your grassroots support to help elect leaders who will invest in the well-being of hardworking Ohioans. And while our fight is far from over, thanks to you, we're in a good spot to hit the ground running in March.

**As we continue to fight tooth and nail to protect Ohio's future, we are grateful to have you by our side. I hope we can continue to count on your support in the important work ahead to turn Ohio blue.**

Thank you again for your support,

Liz Walters
Chair
The Ohio Democratic Party  The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59540673/394473159/-1337184122?refcode=em23_230302_eomty_fnd_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230302_eomty_fnd_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2QzOTdiYi0zMmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GMScAcESX9isSeGA8g4Y_gei9bGHRvKiap9D9GzAR0Q=)

name: Gordon Robinson
subject: FWD: Join us - climate action from the comfort of your home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
| | | Hi Peter, I’m checking in to make sure you saw Sam’s email last week. Soon, we and our partners in OCN will be hosting Virtual Lobby Days – [**join us!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59540701/394473260/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4YTZkYjM1LTMzYjktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hvEyTXtsgOhuYcB-HKUaEQ0nNDRCDWFL_m_CDHpXUQg=&emci=4e212c83-2db9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=68a6db35-33b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) The Clean Green Lobby Machine is powered by people like you who believe we need to protect our environment and our climate. During the **Virtual Lobby Days from March 21st to March 23rd** , you’ll receive training and get a chance to learn about our priorities for 2023. You’ll meet your lawmakers, tell your story, and urge them to make environmentally-friendly decisions that help combat climate change. And, it will be a great time with your fellow environmental and climate advocates. **The whole event will be on Zoom, so you can join us from anywhere.[RSVP today for the OLCV/OCN Lobby Days on March 21st to 23rd! ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59540702/394473261/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4YTZkYjM1LTMzYjktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hvEyTXtsgOhuYcB-HKUaEQ0nNDRCDWFL_m_CDHpXUQg=&emci=4e212c83-2db9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=68a6db35-33b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230)** I hope to see you there. Gordon Robinson, OLCV Engagement Organizer [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59540703/394473262/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4YTZkYjM1LTMzYjktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hvEyTXtsgOhuYcB-HKUaEQ0nNDRCDWFL_m_CDHpXUQg=&emci=4e212c83-2db9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=68a6db35-33b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, Want to make a difference for our environment and climate from your couch or kitchen table? [**Join us on March 21st to 23rd for OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Days!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59540704/394473263/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4YTZkYjM1LTMzYjktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hvEyTXtsgOhuYcB-HKUaEQ0nNDRCDWFL_m_CDHpXUQg=&emci=4e212c83-2db9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=68a6db35-33b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) We made it even easier to participate this year. You don’t have to drive to Salem. You don’t have to spend an entire day on Zoom. All you have to do is pull up to your computer. And, in total, it will only be about four hours of your time over a couple days. **OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Days – March 21st to 23rd**
The Virtual Clean Green Lobby Machine Returns (via Zoom) to Support 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon
**Tuesday, March 21st, from 6pm-8pm** – Priority Presentations & Training (all participants)
**Wednesday, March 22nd, hold from 9am-5pm** – Lobby Meetings for SDs 1-16
**Thursday, March 23rd, hold from 9am-5pm** – Lobby Meetings for SDs 17-30
[You can look up your senate district (SD) here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59540705/394473264/1765198759?appid=fd070b56c975456ea2a25f7e3f4289d1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4YTZkYjM1LTMzYjktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hvEyTXtsgOhuYcB-HKUaEQ0nNDRCDWFL_m_CDHpXUQg=&emci=4e212c83-2db9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=68a6db35-33b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230)
Place: Entirely on Zoom (links sent to RSVPs a few days prior)
[**RSVP today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59540706/394473265/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4YTZkYjM1LTMzYjktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hvEyTXtsgOhuYcB-HKUaEQ0nNDRCDWFL_m_CDHpXUQg=&emci=4e212c83-2db9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=68a6db35-33b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) In 2021, I attended the OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Day as a volunteer. I had a great time! Living in Bend, it’s not easy to get to Salem. With a virtual lobby day, it made it possible for me to show up for what I care about - stronger climate action and environmental justice. It was an incredible experience to join with so many others from the environmental community all across the state. This year, I am excited to be an engagement organizer at OLCV and helping plan our upcoming lobby days. Whether you have joined us for the Clean Green Lobby Machine year after year or this is your first time at an OLCV/OCN Lobby Day, we are excited to have you [join in](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59540707/394473266/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4YTZkYjM1LTMzYjktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hvEyTXtsgOhuYcB-HKUaEQ0nNDRCDWFL_m_CDHpXUQg=&emci=4e212c83-2db9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=68a6db35-33b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230)! We will have a training and staff support throughout to make sure you can make the most of your lobby days for the environment. You will also get to hear the latest on what’s happening in Salem - the good and the bad. Whether you are in Bend, Beaverton, or beyond, we hope you join in to make 2023 a big year for climate action and environmental protection. [RSVP today for the OLCV/OCN Lobby Days on March 21st to 23rd!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59540708/394473267/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4YTZkYjM1LTMzYjktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hvEyTXtsgOhuYcB-HKUaEQ0nNDRCDWFL_m_CDHpXUQg=&emci=4e212c83-2db9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=68a6db35-33b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) I will see you there! Sam Lewis, OLCV Bend Engagement Organizer | |

You will also get to hear the latest on what’s happening in Salem - the good and the bad. Whether you are in Bend, Beaverton, or beyond, we hope you join in to make 2023 a big year for climate action and environmental protection. I will see you there! Sam Lewis, OLCV Bend Engagement Organizer | | ---|---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. name: Andy Biggs
subject: Help me impeach Mayorkas, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62385873:64nhS3GWN:m:1:3331421248:7382AC265E2BF9AAA8AF3C89A16FEEFF:r)
---
| Peter,
Under Biden's Homeland Security Director, Alejandro Mayorkas, the Southern Border has been thrown into crisis...**causing an unprecedented wave of deadly drugs and unvetted illegal immigrants.**
That's why I just introduced IMPEACHMENT proceedings for Mayorkas in the House.
I think we have a great shot of kicking him out of office, holding the Biden Administration accountable, and beginning the long fight to secure the border.
But if I'm going to be successful here, **[I'll need your help to hold my Republican colleagues accountable](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62385873:64nhS3GWN:m:1:3331421248:7382AC265E2BF9AAA8AF3C89A16FEEFF:r)** to vote with me to send Mayorkas packing. | | | | [IMPEACH MAYORKAS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62385873:64nhS3GWN:m:1:3331421248:7382AC265E2BF9AAA8AF3C89A16FEEFF:r)
---
As a proud Arizonan, I've seen the destruction that Biden and Mayorkas's open border policies have created in my own backyard...

**...Like the influx of deadly drugs like fentanyl through our southern border that is killing nearly 100,000 Americans a year.**

Moderate Republicans and RINOs will only hold us back if we don't demand they listen to their constituents and Patriots like you.

**[So please, help me demand every Republican join me (and you, and every American) in our fight to impeach Mayorkas and secure our Southern Border.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62385873:64nhS3GWN:m:1:3331421248:7382AC265E2BF9AAA8AF3C89A16FEEFF:r)**

Thank you so much for your support here.

To Victory,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62385873:64nhS3GWN:m:1:3331421248:7382AC265E2BF9AAA8AF3C89A16FEEFF:r)
---

subject: FWD: SB 5599 to see floor action soon!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
This radical bill completely tramples on parental rights and harms children! Contact Senate leadership and tell them to STOP this bad bill! | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=9c5a642f58&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Peter,

Last night, SB 5599 was unfortunately passed by Senate Democrats on a party-line vote and is headed to the House of Representatives. **We must do everything we can to stop this bill from passing the House and becoming state law. **

We need more people to sign our petition and send emails straight to the inboxes of Democrat House leadership and key Democrat Representatives in swing districts. [Please sign and share the petition to email these Democrat representatives and tell them to vote NO on SB 5599 when it goes to a vote in the house.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=8d42c89bee&e=6a281f566d)

Unlike the state Senate, **every house Democrat will be up for election NEXT year. They need to hear from their constituents that they should stand up for parents **\- or we will replace them with Legislators who will.

After signing and sharing the petition, please consider finacially joining the fight to help us spead the word on this terrible legislation and alert more voters to what radical Democrats are doing in Olympia.
---
| [Step up and help us STOP SB 5599](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c6589ff58a&e=6a281f566d "Step up and help us STOP SB 5599")
---
| Thank you for standing with us and fighting for kids and families.

Caleb Heimlich
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party
---
|
---
| **BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE:**
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peter,
**SB 5599 - Gender Changes for Kids - has officially
passed out of committee and will likely see a vote
on the Senate floor TODAY!**
We need all hands on deck to STOP this terrible bill that will divide families and allow the state to transition children without parental notification or consent.

In the origin committee, SB 5599 had an OVERWHELMING response from parents across the state - **up to 98% of those testifying were AGAINST this bill.** Yet radical Democrats ignored the voices of parents and are RUSHING this bill to the Senate floor.
---
|
---
| **We are asking YOU to step up to stop this bad bill. **[You can email Senate leadership through this link and let them know where you stand on this issue](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b5ccfd8d3b&e=6a281f566d).

[Chip in to help fight this egregious bill. ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=6d6b31d89c&e=6a281f566d)Yesterday we sent nearly 100,000 texts to parents across the state warning them about SB 5599 and asking them to take action, so far thousands have done so! [Every $25 contributed will let us text 500 more parents and make them aware of what Democrats are doing in Olympia and ask them to take action.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b183ffa72b&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Step up and help us STOP SB 5599](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d8be58daa7&e=6a281f566d "Step up and help us STOP SB 5599")
---

To victory,

\- Team WAGOP

name: Tim Kaine
subject: A personal request for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friends, family, and longtime supporters, you may know that I just celebrated my 65th birthday, and I wanted to take a moment to thank you all for the thoughtful birthday wishes that you’ve sent my way. It’s certainly a milestone, and one I feel lucky to be marking.

Another milestone I’m marking this year is the kickoff of my re-election campaign to the Senate, just over 10 years after being sworn in for the first time in January of 2013. I feel deeply honored to serve the people of Virginia — I love the Commonwealth, and I love its citizens. Nothing would make me happier than the opportunity to keep delivering results for families across VA and the USA.

**So I have a personal request for you today:** [_If you’re able, will you split a donation between Voter Protection Project and my re-election campaign? Your support will help us build the strongest possible foundation to keep Virginia blue amid a strong GOP push to regain power._](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41404?t=6&akid=6622%2E878179%2ExHeQ55)

**You can donate at this link:** [_vpproject.us/kaine_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41404?t=7&akid=6622%2E878179%2ExHeQ55)

Thank you very much.

T.K.

Tim Kaine
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6622%2E878179%2ExHeQ55). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6622%2E878179%2ExHeQ55).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6622%2E878179%2ExHeQ55) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=6622%2E878179%2ExHeQ55). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6622%2E878179%2ExHeQ55)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=6622%2E878179%2ExHeQ55)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: NO MORE OIL to Communist China!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
%%previewtext%%

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe2d568e50b54bf689e9e2197c3240f6&_e=pzxxrNPd8L1G0M8qcp5WK_2jdwnURHUeu40nQ6nCvufjrZzG39u6hJ3-qq1DTLJS5_PEorcQK_RZ1amkDfWKtn7KLkDUVf1RK1xhq01TusO4EaIu6S6lS0C_lXo50v7VP1-qDoalnf1YzjgGgNBisVwteVymBfY_7B-PhHDiOHhnsDXmmRvHWOfiL_Xxb4p-17n0hLFaoRXGMwbic5u5xvDffwOmlfxhyfFXw5CqVejtE0cIoG3TUQ06Hoajj7bqyalL3zcWGzuPCAh2Zf1-Mw09Z68foQ1fobqn2YZdyZEo-g4lq3sZf4_jf62vmlQ0vNwL8H5emLt5wwNOqxE7FvAU6aLbswp00Lvw3Yd0jPP6R0LZawnHRzftKflXZCj1KseKuH6otEInE34663riZJXOLkSpx4ksKjevDqUGc-Zj67TX9Xby7MuJe9awNU16uFoKV8g3h4mTf5oe1D50RHkFkTEcOCFBc8GwyYBnWgn8ep3GI2Wr6IhvgaaXvdTg_-G_CfnmvqZPvx1BLOrZOTcyMHNRZehuqqWIBXYMd2ltRCH2iv2t1RMDJxjJ-7edQQNeX4kN7E0AfqUe0RWD8A%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative, My message is clear and simple: **NO MORE OIL to Communist China!** I'm proud to be leading the charge, alongside West Virginia Democrat Joe Manchin, to build a bipartisan coalition to stop the Biden administration from shipping one more drop from our nation's oil reserve to our nation's greatest advisory. Senate Republicans are all-in and we have FIVE Democrat cosponsors on the Cruz-Manchin Protecting America's Strategic Petroleum Reserve from China Act!**
** **I shared more on this important legislation on one of the latest episodes of _Verdict_. **
---

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend: When I was growing up, I never could have imagined that I'd run for elected office one day – let alone become the first computer programmer and the first former synagogue president ever elected to the Senate.
As the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran, I was surrounded by loved ones who taught me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence – and I've carried these with me my entire life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59558954/394535452/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2342-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGY0ZWMxZS02MGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bpY83lwwJc2cbXVRFm5MyUqSfsNbT7PayCTW-ejlwh8=)
I carried those values with me when I was working as a cocktail waitress at Caesars Palace to pay for college, becoming the first in my family to graduate. I carried them with me when I was working as a computer programmer in a male-dominated field.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59558955/394535453/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2342-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGY0ZWMxZS02MGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bpY83lwwJc2cbXVRFm5MyUqSfsNbT7PayCTW-ejlwh8=)
I carried those values with me during my first-ever campaign for Congress in 2016, when I flipped a highly competitive district from red to blue,**and in 2018, when I defeated a Republican incumbent against all odds – becoming the second woman senator in Nevada's history.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59558956/394535454/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2342-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGY0ZWMxZS02MGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bpY83lwwJc2cbXVRFm5MyUqSfsNbT7PayCTW-ejlwh8=)
To this day, those values of hard work, determination, and persistence fuel my fight to advocate for working families and bring much-needed progress to the lives of all Nevadans.
**But right now, experts at _The Washington Post_ are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection – and _FiveThirtyEight_ says that Nevada could once again decide Senate control.**
The GOP will come after me with everything they've got, and I simply cannot fight back without your grassroots support. **[So please, friend, will you contribute $5 or more today to help me defend my seat and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59558957/394535455/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2342-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGY0ZWMxZS02MGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bpY83lwwJc2cbXVRFm5MyUqSfsNbT7PayCTW-ejlwh8=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59558958/394535456/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk2342-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGY0ZWMxZS02MGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bpY83lwwJc2cbXVRFm5MyUqSfsNbT7PayCTW-ejlwh8=)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59558959/394535457/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk2342-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGY0ZWMxZS02MGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bpY83lwwJc2cbXVRFm5MyUqSfsNbT7PayCTW-ejlwh8=)

Thank you for taking the time to read my story – and for standing with me in the fight ahead.

Jacky Rosen

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: An important time for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230228-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230228-email]Hi there, My team reached out yesterday with an update on our end-of-month goals. Earlier this week, we reached our goal of raising $1,000. Since we still had time before our deadline, yesterday we decided to set the goal of raising another $1,000. We are SO close to reaching this second goal, and I know if everyone reading this does their part, we can get there. With only a few hours left until the end of February, I need to know you’re with me. Can you chip in $25 right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230228-email&amount=25] In Congress, I will go above and beyond to deliver for NC-13. But in order to keep up this work for another term, I need everyone on my grassroots team to go above and beyond as well. This seat means so much to me, and representing you all in Congress is an honor I do not take lightly. I love this job, and I hope to continue to serve my community in this capacity for years to come. Thank you for being on our team! Wiley Nickel Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. With only a few hours left until the end of February, I need to know you’re with me. Can you chip in $25 right now? [] In Congress, I will go above and beyond to deliver for NC-13. But in order to keep up this work for another term, I need everyone on my grassroots team to go above and beyond as well. This seat means so much to me, and representing you all in Congress is an honor I do not take lightly. I love this job, and I hope to continue to serve my community in this capacity for years to come. Thank you for being on our team! Wiley Nickel Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. name: Ilhan Omar HQ
subject: Your Signature is Requested → Add your name to personally endorse Ilhan Omar for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We're looking for a LOT of signatures today
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=13%2E791427%2E8UG1Cz)
Hi friends —we're reaching out today to ask you to **[add your name and personally endorse Ilhan Omar for Congress.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/personal-endorse-ilhan-omar/?source=em230302-ak-ip-wu-10&refcode2=13.791427.8UG1Cz&akid=13%2E791427%2E8UG1Cz)**
**[ENDORSE ILHAN](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/personal-endorse-ilhan-omar/?source=em230302-ak-ip-wu-10&refcode2=13.791427.8UG1Cz&akid=13%2E791427%2E8UG1Cz)**
Here's why:
Thanks to our grassroots progressive movement, Ilhan was re-elected to serve her third term in the People's House last year.
It was your phone calls, canvassing shifts, and $5, $10, and $25 donations that powered our campaign to victory, and Ilhan and our entire team are so thankful for your support.
But the truth is that after voting to remove her from the House Foreign Affairs Committee, it's clear that the GOP attacks are just getting started.
The fact is, Kevin McCarthy and his right-wing allies would love nothing more than to kick Ilhan out of Congress entirely.
An important part of making sure that doesn't happen is getting as many people to say they stand with Ilhan and believe in our people-powered campaign as we possibly can.
What do you say?
**[Will you add your name to personally endorse Ilhan Omar today? We're looking for a LOT of signatures today, and are hoping yours is next on our list.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/personal-endorse-ilhan-omar/?source=em230302-ak-ip-wu-10&refcode2=13.791427.8UG1Cz&akid=13%2E791427%2E8UG1Cz)**
The truth is that no one — not Ilhan Omar or anyone else — can take on the right-wing and fight back against extremist Republicans alone. That's something that will ONLY happen if we're all in this together.
Thanks for being a part of our fight.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan
**[ENDORSE ILHAN](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/personal-endorse-ilhan-omar/?source=em230302-ak-ip-wu-10&refcode2=13.791427.8UG1Cz&akid=13%2E791427%2E8UG1Cz)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=13%2E791427%2E8UG1Cz)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=13%2E791427%2E8UG1Cz)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=13%2E791427%2E8UG1Cz)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=13_791427_8UG1Cz&akid=13%2E791427%2E8UG1Cz)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Rick Scott
subject: I just got off the stage at CPAC

body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | I just got off the stage at CPAC, and I’m more fired up than EVER to fight for our conservative future.

As I told the crowd, I’m making great progress in becoming the least popular man in Washington.

I’ve got the President lying about me. Both Democrat and Republican Senate leaders lying about me. And I’ve got the president’s incoherent press secretary attacking me.

But it’s our job to stand up for truth and freedom, and we will do it, no matter the cost.

I am FILLED with hope for our future, and I’m so excited to work with these bright young conservatives to RESCUE AMERICA!

[**Join our team NOW and become a part of our movement to RESCUE AMERICA!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=90b5eae64e5e4de7ad0e6a90e4ad7045&_e=FeNvFnc9ul3mU3YVE_5CTcEQn5abGTnzWYexbziXAjvUQTcZblmzVW9k-X7TZnnFkck1yqPGGQGF7VBvQaaBaSO9D3uMiS9m7ER0D_rCx65nALaQBdSS27BAiKBhACT0wLjtUqvOemDY3lwkaaG_DwIdzHPgUNFwuj3XkN30TKcBaGHTiriPp441_k9Gqpx6Fv-uaao2Vn3LbkrtYngFMfD0HYFG2R45SF2__MzZIGMf14AOZciFSChpsYKsQ-GZI2waTeNchym6olKtH9D9Lrk1vrwPHDKedKw1WNOw_fIK_-EB3hLUr-DIdTncj0t0q9BpVQ1mxRKGVeibeMkS9Rzvyz7WOShz2YUA8B7UNMA%3D)

clean_body: How bad is it going to get? Please let us know. | Peter, We won't keep you long, but we really want your opinion. With fentanyl pouring across our Southern Border and millions of illegal immigrants coming into our country under Joe Biden, we wanted to reach out and let you give the Southern Border security under Joe Biden a letter grade. JD Vance has been in Washington, D.C., for just a few short weeks, but he's doing everything in his power to tackle the border crisis immediately for the sake of ALL AMERICANS. Please let him know how you think Joe Biden is handling our Southern Border security below. | Thank you for taking the time out of your busy day to let JD know how you feel. Team Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Can I explain?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I know it’s early in the month, but I’m hoping that our FEC report will show the highest possible number of Founding Donors to our campaign.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1885%2E5257348%2E_SPGCF)
Hi Derek,
In just a moment, I’m going to ask for your donation to support our campaign ahead of this month’s quarterly FEC fundraising deadline, but first I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain what this deadline means, and why your support ahead of it is so critical to our campaign.
Every three months, all federal campaigns file public reports with the Federal Election Commission detailing how much they’ve spent and how much they’ve raised in the prior three months. Considering we just launched our campaign, needless to say this deadline is one of the biggest ones for us.
It’s how the media, our supporters, and, yes, undecided voters will determine the strength of our campaign and ability to win next November.
I know it’s early in the month, but I’m hoping that our FEC report will show the highest possible number of Founding Donors to our campaign. If you’ve contributed before, your support helps us reach even more people to build our campaign.
**[So Derek, contribute any amount today. Your support is the driving force behind our campaign.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230302_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=1885%2E5257348%2E_SPGCF)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $3](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=mar2023_abs_em.DC74Jc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230302_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=1885%2E5257348%2E_SPGCF)

clean_body: | I know it’s early in the month, but I’m hoping that our FEC report will show the highest possible number of Founding Donors to our campaign. Hi Derek, In just a moment, I’m going to ask for your donation to support our campaign ahead of this month’s quarterly FEC fundraising deadline, but first I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain what this deadline means, and why your support ahead of it is so critical to our campaign. Every three months, all federal campaigns file public reports with the Federal Election Commission detailing how much they’ve spent and how much they’ve raised in the prior three months. Considering we just launched our campaign, needless to say this deadline is one of the biggest ones for us. It’s how the media, our supporters, and, yes, undecided voters will determine the strength of our campaign and ability to win next November. I know it’s early in the month, but I’m hoping that our FEC report will show the highest possible number of Founding Donors to our campaign. If you’ve contributed before, your support helps us reach even more people to build our campaign. subject: 🎉Speaker Joanna McClinton makes PA history!

body:
Yesterday, Representative Joanna McClinton became the first woman and the first Black woman Speaker of the Pennsylvania House. | | |
---
| | Dear Peter, History in Pennsylvania has been made once again! **Yesterday, Representative Joanna McClinton became the first woman and the first Black woman Speaker of the Pennsylvania House. Talk about an historic week for Pennsylvania!**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59545413/394490664/-1706735226?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI0NTk2NC00MWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XwIddH0xb1A72JrMY4zvoJl8ydvJS3vLVRidy5t0ChU=&emci=42b5f158-3bb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f1245964-41b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25616296)
---
Speaker McClinton is no stranger to being a trailblazer – she’s broken glass ceilings and has gone to bat for Pennsylvania families time and time again during her decades long career as a public defender, advocate, and legislator. Now she’ll take on her next role as Speaker and we can’t wait to see everything she accomplishes! This groundbreaking victory would not have been possible without the incredible candidates in the November and February elections whose wins helped cement a Democratic majority. Thank you to the candidates, volunteers, donors, and voters who made that happen! If you’d like, please take a few minutes to send Speaker McClinton your congratulations by [**_signing this virtual card here_**.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59545415/394490665/-1706735226?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTI0NTk2NC00MWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XwIddH0xb1A72JrMY4zvoJl8ydvJS3vLVRidy5t0ChU=&emci=42b5f158-3bb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f1245964-41b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25616296) **We are thrilled to have such a strong champion for women, marginalized communities, and working families lead our party in the House.** Madame Speaker has never sounded so good! Pennsylvania Democrats
---

It's the biggest race of the year according to The New York Times. | | | We have good news, Peter – Last Tuesday's Wisconsin primary for the Wisconsin Supreme Court saw high democratic turnout. Now, in just over a month, Wisconsin voters return to vote in one of the more consequential races of the year. Don't believe us? Take it from _The New York Times:_ _"Wisconsin will hold an election that carries bigger policy stakes than any other contest in America in 2023."_ That's why United Rural Democrats is mobilizing in support of Janet Protasiewicz for Wisconsin Supreme Court. She's a community leader with a 25-year track record as a prosecutor and lifelong advocate for victims of crime. Her reputation is one of being fair and impartial. **[Will you split a donation with United Rural Democrats and Janet for Justice here?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zc44LZV2api6sgGKzUmnD16mCsiTWnyJlpTaXVoBhFKeA_oe5xyCx1_Jypr1WhkaS_KpX774lHyPDYHNNaL6qgmnkA-FfftNM3lW4jMe6UR8NGKH5oaN02qkKbDnFy6QMrDsFzI7zVtsywiNMHoTp2KaKGclhQHd5omkMNvbmvj4JMGV-AsmHouUmGgFByAnh4c2m2pgMfcGjSCSBsgVq0WBT-vZQaYhP65m7v-9Jrgpt867oKGWDShOD_Mnu1EOQAmWWJutVWzApCLbbM5zDDCago-F72yxxe4W2e1WiVLOCEEol0IQtJ0AwEu0ktlKjaejhmtmBP-VXMHADLM5FtN71K-4cQoAVD2p6nMSZpOv6tmA4KD08k5MW2Oi8dCJKIKFlDclrYEPcEzPtDPLX_/3u5/q-fiET0QQjSgfrnhcr-CqQ/h0/TujjL3YH4unYBX62xgEYz72s5hVsmtuiiwLyjWzy37U)** **[Contribute Now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zc44LZV2api6sgGKzUmnD16mCsiTWnyJlpTaXVoBhFKWo_dfufsSyJ4x0kcTIjI3U2VfrgciFsRKRjDGM2OT2qbzXEYrR0j_g1Idvg_Fyt8xXoZqZtqIk-gQCXT2-gmFfPOV0QESkfwp-PA1Rfl5TySXlBDbRdzpnvG40v3uWz45xZWJ0Jzt6dHfRY5cPot-gS9Hk03RbTYffPZMyoVRx8INgz7wturu8aNFiedVjL1RT55ETNw1QJhSrAigUfyMKJqcwI2IAU9sM16JP1FzGVwWYIef4baxitf55BkITJLm-n1EidJYp8C1K5_GDIMNdJGpNU6ZOCcoMQSJjegmvjL9HN5-IWulKWF4LpC7taqWQnGpn34lzbI-MbfJSg1K42iqmz_U-k634FXeYZ1SI4/3u5/q-fiET0QQjSgfrnhcr-CqQ/h1/J1W4L4qDjelnKWDDeoiYS0f2rbhVhZJamAf3M1T2mCY)** There's so much at stake — and the future of reproductive rights in Wisconsin hangs in the balance ahead of this election which will decide its fate. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Three years in prison for a flag
body:
Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba. | | | | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62384695:JSlGq3GON:m:1:3365131770:58CFE05FD623E51F86CA9483FF1235EE:r)
---
| |
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62384695:JSlGq3GON:m:1:3365131770:58CFE05FD623E51F86CA9483FF1235EE:r)Dear Peter,

[ **Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE!** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62384695:JSlGq3GON:m:1:3365131770:58CFE05FD623E51F86CA9483FF1235EE:r)

January 6 Peaceful Protester Kevin Seefried has been sentenced to three years in federal prison.

Did he attack the U.S. Capitol Police? No

Did he break windows? No.

**Kevin was sentenced to three years in prison because he carried a Confederate flag through the U.S. Capitol building on Jan. 6, 2021.**

The NBC News headline says it all:

"Man who carried a Confederate flag in the Capitol on Jan. 6 is sentenced to 3 years."

You'll notice there isn't one word there about the crimes he allegedly committed ... just the flag.

U.S. District Judge Trevor McFadden blasted Ken's carrying of the flag as "shocking" and "outrageous."

Kevin carried the flag only as a symbol of protest, not to support racism or slavery.

But that didn't save him ... neither did his forced public apology.

What's worse, the federal prosecutor wanted Kevin to serve 70 months - 5 years and 10 months - in prison for his "crimes!"

**Meanwhile, foaming at the mouth radicals in Black Lives Matter and Antifa who 've rioted, burned down buildings and businesses, beaten, and terrorized everyday Americans haven't even been ARRESTED! **

This is outrageous!

That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. **

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! **

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

[ **Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62384695:JSlGq3GON:m:1:3365131770:58CFE05FD623E51F86CA9483FF1235EE:r)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

You're the key to making these pivotal fights as effective as possible.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62384695:JSlGq3GON:m:1:3365131770:58CFE05FD623E51F86CA9483FF1235EE:r)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

Billionaires avoid paying taxes on the source of their wealth: the increasing value of their stock and other assets. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvDJm4e-6OxYdTlW0Y6ysKwy9-Du-hXptI5PoEKqY7pfpIAyghmVBVJVLchzFhu0GZJwKfya28gLh-SfioGYAwpc9vS9Wkm2CVFYVrzSB9TEDt6VZZtoNa3Naaa5FRhXCkDs1CWYVEvGwEEvQNujWDgRxpFSHvSNIPR_Wt6xfxhF43vaAiNhPdASyXoJBaB9ua4JBOqp_57N4SbfeI6RRnxg/3u5/W66F7PAQTd2v1LayBqJu8Q/h0/s8YuJ1fpYSxfeca1rlrdRCiJykeGukPUmFFac2QxlZk)
---
Friend, This tax season, we need to tax the rich. Wealth inequality is at staggering levels: The 10 richest men on earth have six times more wealth than the poorest 3.1 billion people. And in the U.S., two-thirds of likely voters, including a majority of Republicans, agree that billionaires should pay more in taxes. Most people in the U.S. live paycheck to paycheck -- and pay taxes on each of those paychecks. But in multiple years U.S. billionaires such as Jeff Bezos, Elon Musk, and Michael Bloomberg paid zero federal income taxes. This is because our current tax code essentially allows billionaires to avoid paying taxes for years on the source of their wealth: the increasing value of their stock and other assets. In his 2023 federal budget, President Biden has proposed a _Billionaire Minimum Income Tax_ , which was introduced last year in the House of Representatives. This plan would place a 20% tax on the annual wealth gains of the top 0.01 percent of U.S. households, including people worth $100 million or more. It would raise at least $360 billion over 10 years, which we could use to directly invest in working class communities. name: Greater New Haven Greens
subject: Fwd: Greater New Haven Greens - Upcoming Events
body:
[image: image.png]
Dear Greater New Haven Greens,
(to unsubscribe, please respond to this email and let me know)

*We are organizing in the New Haven Area! *

*Our current plans include:*
*Monthly Business Meetings *by Zoom
*Quarterly Social Events *in Person
*Tabling* as much as we can to share literature and engage the public -
grow the chapter - find more candidates to run!

Stay tuned for upcoming details on our March business meeting and an
*Autumnal Equinox* social event.

*Please join* our FB group here
<https://www.facebook.com/groups/151639598620360>

*NOTE*: The Connecticut Green Party is seeking *candidates* for the
Executive Committee: a co-chair and the secretary position
- please let me know if you are interested.

*In the meantime, please note the following activism opportunities!*

*RIGHT NOW!*
[image: Screen Shot 2023-03-02 at 9.18.38 PM.png]
*The Connecticut General Assembly is considering FIVE different RANKED
CHOICE VOTING BILLS on MONDAY March 6th.*
Please support the strongest of the five bills, HB-5701, which would
implement RCV for federal, state, and municipal levels.
Write now to your state representative and senator, telling them why you
support RCV!
then,
*SIGN UP NOW
<https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdbbbSkz155Wvx6SQzaoGW6Y7d7BJ-pDh74FekKBpDCMvgZzw/viewform>*
with Voter Choice Connecticut (VC-CT) to submit written testimony in favor
of RCV. Once you do, you will be linked immediately to VC-CT's *complete
guide* on how to submit written testimony (or even register to testify in
person), complete with a review of the many arguments for why RCV will
greatly improve our democracy!

*FRIDAY, MARCH 3rd*
[image: Screen Shot 2023-03-02 at 8.59.29 PM.png]
Join New Haven Climate Movement for Transform: A Radical Climate Action
Rally on Friday, March 3rd at 4:30pm.
We will be starting behind Trinity Church and marching to New Haven City
Hall while hearing speeches along the way. We will be partnering with Yale
Student Environmental Coalition for the rally. Hope to see you there on
this global day of action
*RSVP HERE <https://fb.me/e/2K2x907QF>*

*MONDAY, MARCH 13th 6:30 PM*
[image: Screen Shot 2023-03-02 at 9.11.08 PM.png]
PNHP-CT's next meeting will take place via Zoom. To sign up, contact
erica.heiman@gmail.com All single payer advocates welcome.

*SATURDAY, MARCH 18t**h*
[image: Screen Shot 2023-03-02 at 9.14.50 PM.png]
Stay tuned to see if there will be a sister rally we can organize in New
Haven.

*Recent New Articles of Note:*
https://www.commonwealthfund.org/publications/issue-briefs/2023/jan/us-health-care-global-perspective-2022
https://jacobin.com/2023/02/department-of-transportation-train-brake-regulation-ohio-derailment/

*The Greater New Haven Green Party is a chapter of the Connecticut Green
Party.*
[image: GPCT logo png.png]
[image: Screen Shot 2023-03-02 at 9.33.29 PM.png]

So when Josh Hawley celebrated their endorsement, he showed us exactly who he really is — just another corrupt politician willing to let massive corporations spend unlimited amounts of money to gut our communities and undermine our democracy.
**Lucas Kunce is building a movement to defeat Josh Hawley without a cent from corporate PACs so that when he’s in the U.S. Senate, you’ll always know he’s fighting for real working people** — not the giant corporations and political elites that have spent decades tearing up our country. And that’s why we’re reaching out to you today, Peter.
Every day and every dollar between now and Election Day is another opportunity for us to get Lucas’ message in front of voters and expose Josh Hawley for the fraud he is. name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Reflections on Women’s History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
I am so grateful for all the strong women who came before me – who fought for the right to vote, who advocated for the right to make their own healthcare decisions, and who stepped up to be voices for the voiceless.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59550365/394494136/205369934?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230302-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGQwZmE3MS00NWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2J9_gmk4fVjcJ318Nze_7cQb5dfeTwxjMxgfwg8xKjA=)
---
| Hi team,

**Happy Women’s History Month!** I am so grateful for all the strong women who came before me – who fought for the right to vote, who advocated for the right to make their own healthcare decisions, and who stepped up to be voices for the voiceless.

I am so proud to be the first Democratic woman to represent West Michigan in Congress, and it is not a responsibility I take lightly. While we’ve come such a long way in our fight for women’s rights, there is still a long way to go.

Since the conservative-majority Supreme Court’s decision last year to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , we’ve seen attacks on reproductive rights from state legislatures, GOP politicians, and courts all across the country. My promise to you is that I will always advocate for the equal rights of all the people of West Michigan.

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for your support.

Sincerely,
Hillary
---
