name: Eric Swalwell
subject: McCarthy gave Tucker WHAT?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
Is this what it’s come to? Rather than allowing a federal reinvestigation, MAGA Republicans are just going to pass off sensitive information to a known Trumped-up dogmatist to sift through?

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59550954/394495290/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGExMGI5Mi00NWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vVgqnxYdHghvNqOsRYFenBCsdmKZDhUOTKDWbME5FEc=&emci=761e9f67-59b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d8a10b92-45b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | **Peter, I’m speechless.**

Speaker Kevin McCarthy granted conspiracy peddling political pundit Tucker Carlson exclusive access to _more than 40,000 hours_ of security footage from inside the Capitol during the Jan. 6 insurrection.

Is this what it’s come to? Rather than allowing a federal reinvestigation, MAGA Republicans are just going to pass off sensitive information to a known Trumped-up dogmatist to sift through?

**Peter, this goes beyond what any of us could have even predicted.**

Giving zealots like Tucker Carlson free rein to create and foster conspiracies is not only unprecedented, but completely dangerous. This just goes to show far McCarthy will go to pander to election deniers, literal _insurrectionists._

McCarthy, my colleagues, and I all have a duty to find the truth about who was there, who incited the insurrectionists, and how we can make sure that our democracy never again faces that same threat.

This latest stunt has only emboldened me even more to demand truth and justice, not whatever is filtered through the mouths of conspiracy theorists.

We have to do everything we can to defeat them. Luckily, we have momentum, but we have to keep it up because the race for the majority is neck-and-neck, and every dollar counts. [**_So please, can you split a contribution between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia so we can crush our goal before midnight and keep MAGA Republicans out of the majority?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59550955/394495291/1718100675?refcode=20230302.2_ES_3D&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGExMGI5Mi00NWI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vVgqnxYdHghvNqOsRYFenBCsdmKZDhUOTKDWbME5FEc=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Republicans think they can run away with this seat.
Their game plan is to saturate my district with millions of dollars in attacks against me, and hope that you’ll feel defeated. _But they won’t put out our fire, and they should know better._
The combined power of this campaign helped us keep Battleground Nevada blue in 2018, 2020, and 2022.
Just like years past, individual contributions of 5 or 10 bucks are our only shot at winning this next election. That’s why I need you in this fight with me.
**Our FEC end-of-quarter deadline is this month** – meaning we’ll have to publicly report our fundraising totals and Republicans will have an official view into whether this seat is up for grabs in 2024.
[**All I’m asking for today is that you chip in what you can afford. Whether it’s $5 or $50, you’ll help power my campaign to stay mobilized across NV-03 – one the one of the most competitive seats in the country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59552312/394496498/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230302_FR_EOMTY_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2ZmZmQ4Yy00NmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W44LxPSz1Ojt_iOMuA5W6ztqCjejShWmjZnumHU4FPU=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kerry=20McQuisten?=
subject: My New Book is Out!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/df4e05cd4a30/were-off-and-running-8117681?e=ae2345792a)
---
|
---
| _Hello, Oregon and beyond! I've been waiting for just the right moment to start sending out my newsletter again, and what better time than now? I'm thrilled to announce the release of my new book! I have some equally exciting news coming up in the near future, and I'll share it here soon. -**Kerry**_
---
| |
---
| | | **THE GOVERNMENT WE DESERVE:
The Hard Truth from Behind the Curtain
of an Oregon Gubernatorial Election
ISBN:** 979-8-9865124-4-0
**Price: **$26.95 hardcover, $9.99 Kindle
**Pages: 276**

_**If you thought you knew Oregon's political landscape, you might be wrong.**_

**PRAISE FOR THIS BOOK**
“While election corruption and voter manipulation may look somewhat different between Arizona and Oregon, once you’ve run for statewide office, it’s impossible to unsee the similar sabotage that America First, grassroots candidates face from the swamp everywhere. **THE GOVERNMENT WE DESERVE is a must-read.** It’s a look into the world of politics that will shock the average voter.” _**—Kari Lake,**__2022 Arizona Republican gubernatorial nominee and former television anchor_
“In her explosive new book, Kerry doesn’t just give the reader a glimpse behind the curtain. She tears down the walls and exposes the power players in the shambles of Republican politics in Oregon who would rather remain in the shadows. She reveals all the sordid details of the attacks she faced when she ran a grassroots campaign for governor—and she names names. Attacks from members of one’s own party are, sadly, par for the course in conservative Oregon politics. For decades, Republicans haven’t been able to get out of their own way long enough to mount a serious challenge to the state’s corrupt Democratic machine. Kerry gives you a guided tour, from her first-person perspective on the campaign trail, to the corruption, infiltration by opposing forces, and smear campaigns designed to derail anybody who doesn’t suck up to the Salem swamp. **Anyone who wonders why Republicans have lost Oregon to the forces of communism needs to read this book!** ” **_—Jeff Reynolds_** _, author of the book BEHIND THE CURTAIN, columnist for PJ Media,
former Chair of the Multnomah County Republican Party (2010-14),
voting member of the Oregon Republican Party Executive Committee 2012-2020,
co-founder of the Oregon Tea Party PAC,
and co-founder of the political consulting firm American Strategies_
“From corrupt political players to the certain need for honest elections, Kerry McQuisten’s THE GOVERNMENT WE DESERVE doesn’t just give a first-person witnessing, it ends with a plan for how to get Republicans who love America elected in Oregon.**I hope conservatives everywhere pick up a copy of this book, find their own God-given strengths—and are inspired to fight for our freedoms**.” _**—Mike Lindell**_ _, founder and CEO of My Pillow,
author of WHAT ARE THE ODDS,
philanthropist and political activist _
“**The gloves are off in this no-holds-barred book.** If you ever wanted to know all the juicy details, the seedy dealings, and what really happens behind the scenes of an Oregon political race, it’s all in here. Kerry helps us see why it’s so difficult to get a conservative elected in Oregon, and many will be shocked to learn it’s not just because of the Democrats. I could hardly put this book down. The swamp is full of creatures, and she battled them all.” _**—Jean Hogan-Sampson**_ _, former city councilor of Clatskanie, Oregon_ “During one of the most tumultuous times in American history and U.S. politics, Kerry McQuisten took on the machine. First as a small town mayor standing up against unAmerican mandates, and then as a feisty, fearless candidate for Oregon governor. I saw many similarities in her story as in my own. The issues within our system of electing ‘leaders’ in our country are tarnished and widespread, not only affecting one jurisdiction, but touching every state in our nation. Through it all, Kerry stood strong. She’ll never sit down, shut up, or be shamed for fighting for what makes America great. **This is a must-read book!** ” **_—Dr. Kelli Ward_** _, former Arizona state senator,
U.S. senate candidate and Chairwoman of the Arizona Republican Party;
author of two best-selling books, INSPIRED BY WHAT’S RIGHT
and JUSTIFIED: THE STORY OF AMERICA’S AUDIT, both available at www.KelliWard.com_
“THE GOVERNMENT WE DESERVE is **a must-read for anyone of integrity considering a run for office**. Kerry brings us up close to her journey as businesswoman/mom so tired of political nonsense that she takes over as mayor of her decidedly ‘non-Portland’ city. When the COVID tyranny becomes unbearable and few fight back, she takes her principled passion for freedom across Oregon in a heroic run for Governor. Her writing is so vivid it brings to life each event and every colorful character along the way—the good, the bad and the ugly! That a woman of this talent, substance and character was willing to serve Oregon is a rare and precious thing. I see Kerry McQuisten for AMERICA in our future.” **_—Patti Lyman_** _, RNC National Committeewoman for Virginia and constitutional attorney_
“THE GOVERNMENT WE DESERVE is **a true winner!** An inspiring perspective from the front lines of a tumultuous ongoing political battle. An experienced and principled leader, Kerry shares firsthand the divisiveness and triumphs she faced as a gubernatorial candidate. She reveals the magnitude of failed leadership in a virtuous endeavor—saving the Oregon she and so many love. This book will give you valuable insight with a broad perspective in a very challenging political climate. A must-read for those who share the desire to save our Republic.” _**—Amy Ryan Courser**_ _, 2020 Oregon Republican Congressional nominee;
political commentator and host of Amy Across America; former Keizer, Oregon city councilor;
Oregon Women’s Show 2014 Woman of the Year; small business owner and advocate_
“Kerry McQuisten manages to weave together a story of both perseverance and tenacity while simultaneously displaying grace and kindness ... and her authenticity shines through on every page. THE GOVERNMENT WE DESERVE is**a perfect gift for someone you’d like to see run for office**.” _**—Lori Hinz**_ _, RNC National Committeewoman for North Dakota,
host of “No Apologies” on BEK News_

clean_body: | | | | | Hello, Oregon and beyond! I've been waiting for just the right moment to start sending out my newsletter again, and what better time than now? I'm thrilled to announce the release of my new book! I have some equally exciting news coming up in the near future, and I'll share it here soon. -Kerry | | | | | THE GOVERNMENT WE DESERVE: The Hard Truth from Behind the Curtain of an Oregon Gubernatorial Election ISBN: 979-8-9865124-4-0 Price: $26.95 hardcover, $9.99 Kindle Pages: 276 If you thought you knew Oregon's political landscape, you might be wrong. PRAISE FOR THIS BOOK “While election corruption and voter manipulation may look somewhat different between Arizona and Oregon, once you’ve run for statewide office, it’s impossible to unsee the similar sabotage that America First, grassroots candidates face from the swamp everywhere. THE GOVERNMENT WE DESERVE is a must-read. It’s a look into the world of politics that will shock the average voter.” —Kari Lake,2022 Arizona Republican gubernatorial nominee and former television anchor “In her explosive new book, Kerry doesn’t just give the reader a glimpse behind the curtain. She tears down the walls and exposes the power players in the shambles of Republican politics in Oregon who would rather remain in the shadows. She reveals all the sordid details of the attacks she faced when she ran a grassroots campaign for governor—and she names names. Attacks from members of one’s own party are, sadly, par for the course in conservative Oregon politics. For decades, Republicans haven’t been able to get out of their own way long enough to mount a serious challenge to the state’s corrupt Democratic machine. Kerry gives you a guided tour, from her first-person perspective on the campaign trail, to the corruption, infiltration by opposing forces, and smear campaigns designed to derail anybody who doesn’t suck up to the Salem swamp. Anyone who wonders why Republicans have lost Oregon to the forces of communism needs to read this book! ” —Jeff Reynolds , author of the book BEHIND THE CURTAIN, columnist for PJ Media, former Chair of the Multnomah County Republican Party (2010-14), voting member of the Oregon Republican Party Executive Committee 2012-2020, co-founder of the Oregon Tea Party PAC, and co-founder of the political consulting firm American Strategies “From corrupt political players to the certain need for honest elections, Kerry McQuisten’s THE GOVERNMENT WE DESERVE doesn’t just give a first-person witnessing, it ends with a plan for how to get Republicans who love America elected in Oregon.I hope conservatives everywhere pick up a copy of this book, find their own God-given strengths—and are inspired to fight for our freedoms.” —Mike Lindell , founder and CEO of My Pillow, author of WHAT ARE THE ODDS, philanthropist and political activist “The gloves are off in this no-holds-barred book. name: Jayapal HQ
subject: “House Republicans scour southern border but don’t find any illegal crossings”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
As the newly named **_Ranking Member_ of the House Immigration Subcommittee,** you can be sure I’m going to call out Republicans’ shameless hypocrisy about immigration.
Rep. Jim Jordan, our subcommittee’s Chair, just led his Republican colleagues on **a sham search for “illegal” immigrants at the southern border,** even going so far as to conduct a bogus “investigation.” This is pure performance from a party that clearly has no interest in actually reforming our immigration system or serving those who come to our country looking for a better, safer life.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39666?refcode=em20230302-2230&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2230%2E420207%2ERcIiLQ)
---
[**As Ranking Member, I intend to do everything in my power to stop the GOP’s cruel agenda and fight for our communities. Will you chip in to stand with me?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39666?refcode=em20230302-2230&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2230%2E420207%2ERcIiLQ)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39666?refcode=em20230302-2230&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2230%2E420207%2ERcIiLQ)**
**When I ran for Congress in 2016, I ran unapologetically as an immigrant and South Asian woman.** I ran on my story and my life and my community responded overwhelmingly to send me to the House as **_the first_** South Asian woman elected and one of only **_two dozen_** naturalized citizens in all of Congress.
For years, I’ve pursued justice for immigrants in Washington and all over our nation, starting as an organizer in Seattle and through my six years in Congress until now, serving as Ranking Member on this subcommittee.
I’ve fought unjust deportations, advocated for newly naturalized and immigrant Americans, and mobilized women against cruel family separation policies. I’ve been to the border time after time and spoken to people there -- **real people, not the imaginary “illegal” immigrants Republicans can’t seem to find.**
I know firsthand the difficulties of navigating the immigration system in our country. I came to the U.S. when I was 16, alone, with nothing in my pockets. After 17 years on an alphabet soup of visas, I finally became a U.S. citizen -- which is why I know it’s so important that we establish clear, humane, legal pathways to citizenship.
It’s clear that the Republican leadership of the Judiciary Committee has no intention to engage in good faith to reform our immigration laws for the better. **This is the work that I came to Congress to do, and I will never stop fighting.**
[**I will fight to radically transform our immigration system no matter what, but I’m stronger with you by my side, Peter. Will you donate $3 today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39666?refcode=em20230302-2230&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2230%2E420207%2ERcIiLQ)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230302-2230-footer&t=23&refcode2=2230_420207_RcIiLQ&akid=2230%2E420207%2ERcIiLQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2230%2E420207%2ERcIiLQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2230%2E420207%2ERcIiLQ)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Candace Owens
subject: A bigger plague than COVID
body:
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9T8tuhDAM_Bq4EQUHEnHIoQ-1px537yZ2lqjhIQhq6dc3oKqSZWvG1syYba2NMZ1Wpi7JNoC1d2WwIEFJJQFAQdMJrYnI675l7XWHXDSSRwxR-JU5DWH65JUyPoSbx3KwtdRAnWPjJZueJVKLHgw71XYK0ZfRDiktW6GeCnjLtbHbVxY4Mc3pFMlcH_k7pMrP-0SYwjxlbo7HuARXrpaWrxBj2LTJYR5XmNMbxyUGf9jCPBcAQ6Atj8sG9qTueLt9rEdFzU_13t7hcS7hJfd0LPx_-Scirh9P1rz-AvTlXB8)

Friend,

There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim.

**If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.**

The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare.

My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities.

[_**Can you help leave a legacy of freedom and victory instead of oppression and victimhood? Click here to rush your support with $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9T8tuhDAM_Bq4EQUHEnHIoQ-1px537yZ2lqjhIQhq6dc3oKqSZWvG1syYba2NMZ1Wpi7JNoC1d2WwIEFJJQFAQdMJrYnI675l7XWHXDSSRwxR-JU5DWH65JUyPoSbx3KwtdRAnWPjJZueJVKLHgw71XYK0ZfRDiktW6GeCnjLtbHbVxY4Mc3pFMlcH_k7pMrP-0SYwjxlbo7HuARXrpaWrxBj2LTJYR5XmNMbxyUGf9jCPBcAQ6Atj8sG9qTueLt9rEdFzU_13t7hcS7hJfd0LPx_-Scirh9P1rz-AvTlXB8)

I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. _It taught me never to be a victim again_.

My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media.

As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. **Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. **

**Then one night, the KKK showed up. **

My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds.

_But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. _

_**" My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" **_

My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back!

I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me.

I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same.

[_**Will you send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount to END the victimhood mentality?**__**Click here to rush your support >>>**_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9T8tuhDAM_Bq4EQUHEnHIoQ-1px537yZ2lqjhIQhq6dc3oKqSZWvG1syYba2NMZ1Wpi7JNoC1d2WwIEFJJQFAQdMJrYnI675l7XWHXDSSRwxR-JU5DWH65JUyPoSbx3KwtdRAnWPjJZueJVKLHgw71XYK0ZfRDiktW6GeCnjLtbHbVxY4Mc3pFMlcH_k7pMrP-0SYwjxlbo7HuARXrpaWrxBj2LTJYR5XmNMbxyUGf9jCPBcAQ6Atj8sG9qTueLt9rEdFzU_13t7hcS7hJfd0LPx_-Scirh9P1rz-AvTlXB8)

Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities:

We put together **BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory** for parents, grandparents, and teachers.

This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back.

This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation.

**In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities.**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events.

We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers!

Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality.

Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9j8tuhDAMRb8m7EDBCU5ZZDHtaLrqcmYfEmeIGh6CoJZ-fQOqKlm2fGxdX5OuUSnVolB14bQEU3tbBA0cBBccAATItkJ0znnsGkKPrSEmOQ0mxMovRKkP4yctLvd7Zaeh6HXeaVtCWRsUNbcvHRJvGtVIJM8JbRF1n9K8MnFhcMuxkt0WqsxIbkqHSGZdpO-QSj9tozMpTGNmU9yHOVgmbmbIPDFxrXmxaDd_hRjDiipbe57WDidmmGPwu2bqlQH0wa25nEdhS-Jh7vePZS-d_Cnfmwc8jyG85Zz2mf43_0Sq8-ODqusvP2VfQA)

clean_body: Friend, There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality. This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor. The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare. My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities. I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. It taught me never to be a victim again. My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media. As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. Then one night, the KKK showed up. My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds. But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. " My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back! I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me. I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same. Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities: We put together BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back. This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation. In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities. Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events. We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality. Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Have you heard of Movement School?
body:
#
Hi Peter,
Exciting news: Movement School’s Campaign Fellows 2023 is LIVE and applications are NOW OPEN!
Although this is the most diverse Congress we’ve ever had, the diversity within Congressional campaign staff doesn’t match up. Only 18% of all top House staff are people of color according to a [report](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/129858?t=1&akid=27789%2E1203867%2EpA2QYR) by the Joint Center for Political and Economic Studies. That’s concerning.
Luckily, there’s a program to help correct this and it’s back just in time for the next election cycle!
[**Campaign Fellows 2023 is a campaign training program for progressives that is nation-wide, completely virtual, and 100% FREE.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/129859?t=2&akid=27789%2E1203867%2EpA2QYR)
**[Apply Now](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/129859?t=3&akid=27789%2E1203867%2EpA2QYR)**
Campaign Fellows is Movement School’s 8-week campaign simulation training program for experienced campaigners who are ready to advance into director-level positions. You can apply to specialize in one of five tracks: Field, Fundraising, Communications, Digital, and Campaign Management. Led by some of the best minds in progressive politics, Campaign Fellows will prepare you to win up and down the ballot in your community.
They are looking for people like you -- the next generation of campaign staffers and electoral organizers -- to apply! [**Applications are accepted on a rolling basis, so don’t wait to get yours in.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/129858?t=4&akid=27789%2E1203867%2EpA2QYR)** Deadline to apply is March 6th.
Reach out to [hey@movementschool.us](mailto:hey@movementschool.us) with any questions.
Thank you,
Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=5&akid=27789%2E1203867%2EpA2QYR) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=6&akid=27789%2E1203867%2EpA2QYR) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230302-27789-footer&t=7&refcode2=27789_1203867_pA2QYR&akid=27789%2E1203867%2EpA2QYR)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=8&akid=27789%2E1203867%2EpA2QYR)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=27789%2E1203867%2EpA2QYR)

name: Our Revolution
subject: Who do you support in the California Senate race?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

With Barbara Lee now in the race for
California Senate, there are now three Congressional Democrats running to
take over Dianne Feinstein's seat.

In 2022, Our Revolution's impactful organizing helped elect John
Fetterman, Raphael Warnock, and other important progressives up and down
the ballot.

As we decide where to invest in 2023, we're reaching out to get the
opinion of top supporters like you.

subject: Live updates from CPAC, get my new book
body:
for only $1 when you subscribe | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a96c0a85c022/ari-fleischer-on-beyond-the-briefing-1207156?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | |
# Order my new kids book...
Our children are constantly surrounded by lies in media and pop culture. We need to teach them how to discern the truth. That’s why I partnered with BRAVE Books to write a brand new children’s book that teaches kids the dangers of fake news and how quickly a story can get twisted around. Today ONLY, get my book The Parrots Go Bananas! AND Elephants Are Not Birds for $1.00 when you subscribe to the Freedom Island Book Club! Just use code “FakeNews” to claim this great deal.Teach your kids how to discern the truth when you get your copy of my book today!
---
|
---
| [Get 2 Books for $1.00!](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8a4ed7883c&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
Written for kids 4-12, this book tells a fun story about two amazing characters named Bongo and Asher who are preparing for the biggest ball game of the year. However, a sneaky band of parrots is determined to ruin Bongo and Asher’s reputations by spreading untrue statements about them.Hurry up before this one sells out. It’s sure to be a home run with the whole family and that’s not fake news!!

| [Get My Book Here!](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4cdee29e50&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
---
## East Palestine resident: We don't want photo ops, we need help to rebuild
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f44815552e&e=f6564bbe3b)
|
---
## CPAC returned to Washington, DC...
I’ll be speaking tomorrow at 11:00a and signing copies of “The Parrots Go Bananas!” at 12:00p. Hope to see you all there.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=eadb703d2f&e=f6564bbe3b)
|
---
# Stories I’m Reading...
[Senate kills Biden ESG investment rule in stunning rebuke](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8be31f45d9&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Fox News[ACLU urges US lawmakers not to ban TikTok](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=95f684c486&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Reuters TikTok is owned by the Chinese government and poses a threat to our national security. Ban it. [Hunter Biden revealed longtime business partner was VP Biden’s ‘close confidant and counsel’ in 2014 email](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=33246d9a82&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Fox News [COVID lab leak is a scandal of media and government censorship](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=7da22fe4c3&e=f6564bbe3b) — via New York Post [Air around East Palestine still has high chemical levels — but risk isn’t ‘imminent,’ researchers say](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6067a4aeef&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Politico [Audience gasps after ‘The View’s’ Joy Behar implies Trump-voting Ohioans to blame for toxic train spill](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=402f15b3a4&e=f6564bbe3b) — via New York Post [US Supreme Court’s ‘major questions’ test may doom Biden student debt plan](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e7af95f78e&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Reuters [Opinion | Modernize Medicare Without Cutting Benefits or Raising Taxes ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=40d0351dcc&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Bobby Jindal and Newt Gingrich in WSJ Great piece on how to save Medicare — correctly pointing out that the Biden strategy is to let it go bankrupt. [When it comes to debt, Joe Biden is the Six Trillion Dollar Man ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=dfa4fb6c96&e=f6564bbe3b)— via New York Post
|

Hey,

I wanted to reach out and say: **Thank you!**

After going through the numbers repeatedly, I've confirmed that with your support, we were able to hit our fundraising goal for the first month of our campaign! I knew we could do this, but the fact that you helped get us there makes it all the more satisfying, Peter.

This is a big step forward and a massive moment for our campaign. While there's still a long road ahead of us, I'm glad to know that you've got my back. Together we'll fight for affordable healthcare, a living wage, and an excellent free public education system.

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for being a part of my grassroots team.

¡Vamos!

name: Team NDRC
subject: did you see what President Obama said about our work?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
|
---

Team, did you see what President Obama said about the NDRC’s work? | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59556041/394502078/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230302_FR_3A_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxMzIwOTEzLTUwYjktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CmWNkIr2665wUfOtlCHzzvAnI38vfw9ThyLzkfsqJnI=)
---
He’s right! Together, our grassroots movement helped Democrats:
* **FLIP** state legislative chambers in states like Michigan and Pennsylvania,
* **BLOCK** veto-proof GOP majorities in states like Wisconsin and North Carolina,
* **DEFEAT** election deniers in states like Arizona and Nevada,
* **WIN** full control of state government in states like Michigan and Minnesota.

[**_We are incredibly grateful to this community for giving us the resources to make this happen. Will you make a donation to help us keep up the fight?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59556042/394502079/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230302_FR_3A_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxMzIwOTEzLTUwYjktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CmWNkIr2665wUfOtlCHzzvAnI38vfw9ThyLzkfsqJnI=)

For years, grassroots supporters like you have powered the NDRC’s fight for fairness — and last November, those efforts paid off!

But our work is not over, team. That’s why President Obama also said this:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59556043/394502080/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230302_FR_3A_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxMzIwOTEzLTUwYjktZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CmWNkIr2665wUfOtlCHzzvAnI38vfw9ThyLzkfsqJnI=)
---
We achieved some incredible victories for democracy last November — but by no means are we in the clear. That’s because through voter suppression, gerrymandering, and attacking our electoral institutions, Republicans are not giving up on ways to hold onto unearned power.

We can’t take our progress for granted. Instead, we must recommit to fighting for fairness state by state and all across the country. **So please don’t let up on your support — we need to see this work through to the end. Will you pitch in now?**

body:
A special grand jury investigating Trump and his allies’ attempts to interfere with election results in Georgia recommended multiple indictments | | |
---
| | **UPDATE:****A special grand jury investigating Trump and his allies’ attempts to interfere with election results in Georgia recommended _multiple_ indictments.** Trump could FINALLY be held accountable for his bogus claims of election fraud – and an indictment could BLOCK Trump’s path back to the White House. That’s why he’s already gearing up to fight back – his defense attorneys stated **they’ll fight “tooth and nail” if he’s indicted** and even claimed the investigation was compromised! Peter, it’s been nearly 100 years since we last updated the five-day workweek.

Since then, we’ve seen rapid advancement in technology, automation, and productivity. _**But our working conditions are still stuck deep in the past.**_

The COVID-19 pandemic proved Americans can produce strong results with more flexible and comfortable working conditions.

**That’s why I’m taking the next step to advocate for a four-day workweek. And I’m not alone. **

The Congressional Progressive Caucus and Members of Congress have endorsed my bill, companies around the world are trying their own four-day workweeks, and more and more people are endorsing this movement.

_**Peter, I need your help to spur the critical momentum we need to get this bill off the ground!**_

[**Peter, can I count on you to take 10 seconds to endorse my 4-day workweek legislation and help me make this bill a reality? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59556616/394503690/-2091882210?refcode=MTFC_20230302_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGU2NDAyNy01MmI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DRdbJiOMGX2On1WTDXlOeciZvvoPkc-RnF2jQIE5S38=&emci=f2ac9bd3-25b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=24e64027-52b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18839602)

subject: Action needed: Gisele under attack from Fox News

body:
Washington Post says Gisele is “the right wing’s favorite super villain”
#
Derek, Fox News just went too far. On Tucker Carlson’s show, they called Gisele a “monster” (!!!) and villainized her for supporting her family as John seeks care.
The Washington Post even says she’s **“the right-wing’s favorite super villain.”**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230302-1?refcode=em20230302-1-8272&refcode2=8272_434096_FCckZs&akid=8272%2E434096%2EFCckZs)
_^The clip where Candance Owens called Gisele an “absolute monster”_ 🤢
**[These attacks on Gisele are COMPLETELY over the line. Please — we need your help right now to defend the Fettermans against Tucker Carlson, Candace Owens, and Fox News bullshit. Will you rush a donation to show your support?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230302-1?refcode=em20230302-1-8272&refcode2=8272_434096_FCckZs&akid=8272%2E434096%2EFCckZs)**

John is going to keep getting the care he needs.
Gisele will keep living and fighting with love, because that’s who she is.
**But what’s happening on Fox News is disgusting. Right now is our time to draw the line + fight back — hard. We can’t tolerate this vile misogyny from the right.**
**[If you’re ready to fight back against Fox News, will you pitch in today? Your support will help us counter these BS attacks on John’s family.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230302-1?refcode=em20230302-1-8272&refcode2=8272_434096_FCckZs&akid=8272%2E434096%2EFCckZs)**

We’re in this together,
Team Fetterman

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59556950/394504496/1763729747?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230301_FR_DFDLaunch_0_WL_TomMalinowski_NA_NA_DFDLaunch&refcode2=ab427c04-54b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQyN2MwNC01NGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ja4Ku94dcI0JGG2n_Cnp2RPCH_CzWjEAExZOE_6KO8c=) Last year at a suburban New Jersey high school, I was taking questions from students about current events when a teacher took me aside to say a parent had recently removed a child from one of his American history classes. Why? Because the class was studying the civil rights movement, which the parent said was teaching "critical race theory."

I was saddened, but not surprised. Across America, and in New Jersey, too, MAGA extremists have been taking their culture wars to our schools, banning books from libraries and classrooms, threatening teachers with prosecution, and politicizing school board races, at our kids' expense. Americans who want to protect freedom of expression and our public schools have been playing defense.

[So I'm excited to launch a new effort, Districts for Democracy, to start fighting back. We need at least 5,000 Founding Donors to join our cause today. If you want to get in on the ground floor of this intitiative and help me restore sanity to New Jersey schools, please consider donating $10 today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59556951/394504497/1763729747?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230301_FR_DFDLaunch_0_WL_TomMalinowski_NA_NA_DFDLaunch&refcode2=ab427c04-54b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQyN2MwNC01NGI5LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ja4Ku94dcI0JGG2n_Cnp2RPCH_CzWjEAExZOE_6KO8c=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

---

You've seen the headlines: In Missouri, school districts remove books about the Holocaust because of a new law that subjects teachers to possible jail time for teaching allegedly "explicit" material. In Ohio, the author of a children's book called "It's OK to be a Unicorn" is accused of trying to turn kids gay and banned from reading it in schools. In Florida, the state bans math textbooks with sidebar biographies of African American mathematicians, and school districts pull books about Hank Aaron and Roberto Clemente from libraries because they discuss racism in pro baseball.

This creepy censorship is not the result of some grass roots popular campaign; it's part of a top-down political strategy. Right wing think tanks stirred up fear about "critical race theory," which is not actually taught in any public school in America, to drum up votes for their favored politicians. Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is hoping to ride his crusade against academic freedom all the way to the White House.

In New Jersey, our school board elections are supposed to be non-partisan. But last year, Republican politicians worked with national right wing groups to elect school board candidates trying to bring Florida-style censorship to our state. They told lies that I consider unforgivable — falsely accusing our elementary school teachers of sexually grooming and teaching pornography to kids. Some of these candidates won, and in some districts, we're already seeing teachers and administrators leaving because of the hateful vitriol they're facing.

New Jersey has the best public schools in America. We should keep our schools great, not lower ourselves to the standards of Florida or Texas. We have real problems, too — a shortage of teachers, learning loss due to COVID closures, mental health issues, and more. These are the challenges we should be debating, instead of getting sucked into crazy culture wars.

Districts for Democracy will promote freedom of expression and educational excellence in New Jersey and beyond, by encouraging reasoned public debate of these issues, holding school board members and elected officials accountable, and recruiting and supporting candidates committed to democratic values. I strongly believe in keeping partisanship out of our schools — and I would oppose attempts at censorship by the left as well as the right. So we will work with and support all who uphold these principles, regardless of party.

The good news is that the vast majority of our students and parents have zero tolerance for censorship in our schools. As a member of Congress, I spoke to thousands of students at dozens of local schools. They are incredibly smart, eager to learn about and debate difficult topics. They asked me to protect them from guns, not from ideas! And if anyone tries to ban a book in our state, I'm confident ten times as many kids will want to read it.

These wonderful young people need our organized support. Our country needs us to stand up for the ideals we've taught them to cherish. I hope I can count on your help in the days ahead.

Thank you,

Tom Malinowski
* * *
| Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

---

name: CaucusRoom
subject: What Are They Afraid Of?
body:
Goodbye, Mayor Lightfoot No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Thursday! Have you seen [the big announcement](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-y/) _?_ **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-j/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-t/) **Goodbye, Mayor Lightfoot** [**Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot lost her re-election bid**.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-i/) There will now be a runoff election on April 4th. Lori is **[blaming her 83-point loss on racism](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-d/)**. **What Are They Afraid Of?** A top [**House Democrat signaled that his party will not support a bill to declassify information related to the origins of the COVID-19 pandemic**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-h/) after the DOE and FBI said the virus "most likely" arose from a lab leak in China. **Senate Kills Biden ESG Rule** The **[Senate passed a disapproval resolution formally killing a Biden administration Department of Labor rule](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-k/) **that encourages private retirement plan fiduciaries to consider environment, social, and governance (ESG) factors. **Reining in Biden's Spending** **[Dozens of House Democrats joined with their Republican colleagues on Wednesday](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-u/) i**n a vote to require the White House to assess the inflationary effect of President Biden's executive orders before they are issued. **Fentanyl Crisis** AG Garland says Mexican **[drug cartels unleashed the fentanyl crisis on the U.S."on purpose,"](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-o/)** and urged the Mexican government to "do more" to combat drug trafficking. **Insanity** [**NYC as agreed to pay over $20,000 each, to the hundreds of protesters who participated in the 2020 George Floyd protests** ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-x/)and were "arrested, detained, and/or subjected to force by police officers."

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-m/)!**
* **[Egg](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-c/) **on their face.
* A **[place for Dad](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-q/)**!
* If [**Presidents** ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-a/)were cool.
* She will now **[return to her day job](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkrjudy-trhiujldw-f/)**.
